title: Stuck With Mr. Billionaire
description:
"Curiosity killed the kitty Miss Adams." 

My body stiffened. Slowly I turned around just to see Mr. Parker standing in front of me with hands in his trouser pockets. I bit my lip. I thought he would be angry but when I looked at him. His face showed no emotion. He then started walking towards me I moved back. This continued until my back hit the door. Then he placed his one hand on my side, leaning forward, close to me.

"What was rule number three Miss Adams." His face was extremely close to mine my breath got hitched. I couldn't answer his question why? Because I was more focused in the distance between us.

"I asked you something Miss Adams." He said again.

"T-That t-there a-are prohibited areas i-in the house where I shouldn't g-go."

"It seems like you remember the rules. This room is one of those prohibited areas. So, from next time think before you put yourself into trouble."

I just stared at his eyes. I was lost in those pair of sea-coloured eyes. No other guy has ever affected me this much as Mr. Parker. I get nervous around him. I don't know what this feeling is but this feeling is different. A feeling that I have never felt for anyone.

"Understood?" he said again.

I nodded. "Yes Mr. Parker."
*****************

Liam Parker, 25 year old billionaire. Arrogant, handsome, ruthless, the only thing matters to him is his son and his work.

Bella Adams, 24 year old simple and bubbly girl, who lives with her Nanny in an orphanage. 

What will happen when Bella comes as a babysitter of Liam's son? Let's find out in the story.....

title: Mr Rude & Me (Undergoing Editing)
description:
What happens when Ms Innocent, Chelsea-Anne Richards is kicked out of her dorm room and has no place to stay?

What happens when a curly-haired stranger offers her a place with his best friend?

His best friend, Kyle Chambers aka Mr Rude.

Rude is an understatement, not to mention that he's a womanizer too. He can't stand her and makes sure to mention it every time. She hates to admit it but the guy is drop-dead gorgeous. He looks like a page straight out of a Calvin Klein magazine.

What happens when Chelsea is dragged into the dangerous rollercoaster that is Kyle's life? Will Chelsea be able to deal with all these changes? 

Also... will they ever be friends?

Probably less.

But... maybe M O R E.

Join Chelsea and Kyle through their ups, downs, college life, ridiculous rules, illegal activities, many many arguments, psycho brothers, dangerous fathers, missing sisters, bitter exes, arch-nemesis and most importantly... their crazy, crazy friends.

title: The Personal Assistant.
description:
"James McGregor, CEO of McGregor industries, has passed away yesterday evening after a long battle with cancer. James McGregor, aged 63, was one of the-"

Elizabeth shut the TV off, she couldn't bear to listen to this... She had been there when it happened, she did not need it to be repeated. 

Elizabeth Waverton had been Mr. McGregor's personal assistant for the last three years. During that time the two of them had gotten close. They became friends, as he was as a father to her. 

Ms. Waverton was seen by many as one of the best personal assistants that there was. Most didn't last long at the McGregor's, but Ms. Waverton did. 

She was known for making anything possible, having connections all over town and anywhere you can imagine. 

But now that her former boss and friend is dead the company will be taken over by James McGregor jr. the son of her boss. 

Elizabeth had never quite taken a liking to this man, but he however has taken an interest in her...

title: Something Inside  (Published)
description:
Ashton Miller was the richest, most powerful and sexiest man alive. Being a multimillionaire, he had everything he could have ever wanted; girls, cars, and so much money he didn't know what to do with. As the biggest playboy in New York, Ashton jumps from girl to girl breaking their hearts as he went along. He didn't care about anything other than his company and himself.
  
  Layla Kingston. Layla was NOT rich, actually Layla was basically broke. She worked as a waitress. She didn't have guys all over her, in fact she's only had one boyfriend and that didn't turn out well. Layla didn't have it all, in fact she's had a very hard life, and just when she thinks her life is finally starting to turn over it turns out way different than she thought. 
  
  A story about two wounded polar opposites crossing paths.

title: "From Rivals to Forever: A Journey of Love"
description:
Aditi Sharma

Age: 17 (Class 12th)

 Aditi is a dedicated and hardworking student, known for her exceptional academic performance. Unlike Kabir, who seems to excel effortlessly, Aditi's success comes from her relentless dedication and perseverance. She is often seen studying late into the night, determined to be the best in her class. Aditi's intense focus on her studies is partly fueled by her rivalry with Kabir, whose effortless success and constant teasing get on her nerves.

Kabir Mehra

Age: 17 (Class 12th)

Kabir is a star student at his high school, known for getting excellent grades without seeming to put in much effort. His academic brilliance often puts him at odds with Aditi, his academic rival. However, his effortless success hides a deep admiration and affection for her. Kabir's own drive to excel is fueled by his desire to be recognized and noticed by Aditi. His taunts and teasing are, in reality, attempts to capture her attention and earn her acknowledgment.

title: Breakaway
description:
Ryan wasn't expecting to end up with the captain of the hockey team as a roommate, and she certainly didn't expect the initial sexual tension between them to blossom into love.
 
                                                                      *****
 
In desperate need of a place to stay, Ryan Winters doesn't see an issue with rooming with the captain of the hockey team, Ethan Russell. After all, she's focused on her studies, getting over an ex, and honestly, not that into athletes. Though the more time she spends getting to know her new roommate, the more it becomes apparent that Ethan is the exact type of guy she could fall for. When lines begin to blur and drama from the past threatens to tear them apart, can the two of them find a way to keep both their friendship-and their relationship-from crumbling to pieces?

title: Assistant of Mr. CEO
description:
"What are you thinking about mia cara" he asks me causing my thoughts to drift back to me kissing his jawline. 

"N-nothing" I stutter cursing myself at how breathy I sounded even to my own ears. I watch his mouth curl up into his trademark smirk quickly glancing over with an eyebrow raised. 

"Didn't seem like nothing when you were eye raping the side of my face mia cara" he responds almost mockingly trying to rile me up. Feeling bold and teasing, I open my mouth to share my thoughts. 

"Well if you must know, I was thinking about leaning over and placing a trail of feathery kisses along your jawline" I say nonchalantly pretending to examine my finger nails. I hear him suck in a breath and cursing before I feel him pullover on the side of the rode. 

"That's it" he whispers huskily turning off the engine and reaching his arm over to lift me off my seat. He places me on his lap and I shift around trying to get comfortable but I can tell my movements weren't helping. 

"God damn it mia cara, you're gonna be the death of me" he whispers, his Italian accent coming out as he smashed his lips on mine. The kiss was nothing but aggressive, our hunger and need for each other evident. His hands grip my hair and pull my head back slightly to give him better access to my mouth.

I break away to catch my breath while I begin peppering kisses on his jawline grasping his hair and tugging his head back to get more access. I easily elicit a growl from him and I teasingly bite his neck slightly before pulling away completely. I attempt to get off his lap and back into my seat but his iron grip keeps me still. 

"Mia cara, will you be mine" he asks huskily, his face expressing his nervousness as well as hope. I smile from ear to ear before giving him a sweet peck. 

"Of course you idiot" I say smiling for ear to ear.

title: Female Gaze
description:
Brie Sheridan has had her heart broken way too many times. Rhett Price is usually the culprit, but, this time, he might be the solution.

                                                                  	*****
Brooke 'Brie' Sheridan wouldn't necessarily call herself a hopeless romantic; after all, love is everywhere if you choose to look for it, and there's nothing wrong with wanting to see the beauty and the good in the world. However, her rose-colored lenses are shattered when her boyfriend dumps her right at the start of her final year of college, ruining all her plans for her senior project, and here lie Brie's hopes, dreams, and pieces of her broken heart.

Enter Rhett Price--known commitment-phobe, the bane of Brie's existence, and the reason behind many of her late-night crying sessions during the harshest days of high school. Down on his luck and struggling with improving his reputation, he turns to Brie in a time of need--he'll help her out with her project, and she'll help him look better and more responsible in the eyes of his family.

Old feelings resurface, and it quickly becomes obvious there are certain things you don't always get over. Your first love might as well be one of them. 

                                                                  	*****

title: Employed Epoch Of Alex Brook | Book 1| Humor-Romance (Completed)
description:
"So, let me get this straight. You stomped all over his paperwork?" She started. 

"Not intentionally, but yes," I confirmed it. 

"Threw a drink in his face?" She added. 

"Expensive red wine." I described. 

"Rammed into his car with yours deliberately?" she counted on her third finger. 

"Um...I'm not proud of that one," I said cringing. 

"And called him offensive names?" She ended the list and I winced. 

"Twice." I specified. 

"And you're still alive?" She blinked, looking genuinely surprised. 

"Geez, don't be dramatic or anything..." I frowned at her hyperbolic statement. 

"Maybe he's keeping you around to get revenge." She suggested. Possible. I wouldn't put it past him.

"I didn't know alright!" I exclaimed. 

"Let's hope that excuse is acceptable.." She was merely amused. 

"Working with my new boss is going to be a piece of work." 
                                  **
Synopsis: 
When the CEO of Signature Heights: Jensen Black, and a stubborn employee: Alexandra Brook, clash, it's a battle of wits & a war of perseverance. They are both dead set on making each other's lives hell, but when the story progresses they just might learn that first impressions could be deceiving. As circumstances reveal their true selves and opinions change, things could get complicated especially when suddenly feelings get involved. 

Who would be the first to concede?

Maybe it's not that simple to forgive your archnemesis and maybe it'll result in some hilarious consequences... 
                                 **
Book 1 of a two-part series (completed).High Rankings: # Funny, # Humor, # Comedy, # Romance, #Billionaire

Amazing book, I adore your writing style, and I really enjoyed these characters and story -Reader

Fantastic story, believably flawed characters and deft humour makes for a very engaging read, I could barely put it down to feed my children -Reader

title: matters of the heart
description:
*Slow updates*

After agreeing to be the focus of a college article, 
senior Charlie Murtaugh gets more than he bargains for when he's assigned a clueless sophomore who knows nothing about the sport. 

                                                       ****

A year after staying under the radar due to an injury that almost cost him his career, Charlie Murtaugh has only got one more chance to get the NBA's attention or his dreams of ever going pro get shattered. So he scores an article on the College Paper with hopes of gaining more publicity. 


   Journalism student Lorraine Perabo's first piece as an intern is way out of her comfort zone. Being an antisocial journalist is difficult enough without adding interviewing hot college basketball players to the list, especially when she knows nothing about the game. But what's more daunting is who the focus of her article is- Charlie. The drop-dead gorgeous point guard everyone seems to want to know about. 

    Although these two's relationship starts on a rocky road, they find themselves relying on each other more than expected. In between late interviews and saving each other's asses, they soon realise that lines are easy to cross and that there are no rules regarding matters of the heart.

title: You win
description:
Two athletes, one bet, and the most significant loss of all-two words. 

Meet her: Sofia Delezar, captain of UFN's soccer team. Sarcastic, hard-headed, and tired of the lack of media and respect the female athletes at UFN are receiving. 

Enter him: Stephan Westerman, star player of UFN's football team, careless, big flirt, and so happens to be UFN's golden boy with all the attention in the world. However, struggles to maintain a picture-perfect reputation.

The agreement: In the span of four months, Stephan takes on the task of giving Sofia's soccer team the recognition they deserve. In return, Sofia "dates" Stephan in order to shake off his playboy reputation and mend his relationship with his parents.

                                                        +++

"Don't go falling in love with me, Delezar," his words lace with sarcasm.

"Yeah, 'cause you're such a catch?" My brow cocks upward.

"Wanna bet?" he shrugs, a taunting glint in his brown eyes.

"An easy win," I retort, crossing my arms over my chest.

"A competition," he declares, leaning back in his chair, his smug expression riling me up.

"If, over these four months, someone-"

"You," I interject.

"Right... If it so happens that one of us, specifically you, catches feelings during our little 'relationship,' you lose," he explains, as though it's the simplest concept in the world.

"And what does the winner get?"

"You get to break the other person's heart," he says matter-of-factly.

"Plus..."

"You win."

---

title: C - Suite
description:
An ambitious Indian-American CEO mixes business with pleasure when she finds a hot-headed investor for a new venture. However, when forces threaten their fragile partnership, she must find the culprit before her bank account and bed are emptied.

                                                                                   *****

Nyla Malhotra was just promoted to CEO of one of the fastest growing companies in America. Now, it's do or die as she navigates the ruthless business world where she not only faces a contentious Board of Directors but also plenty of backstabbing along the way.

To prove herself, she is bound to launch a new product line but it get's shelved indefinitely. Needing an investor, she turns to fellow CEO Darius Giordano, a rather brooding and hot-headed businessman with an agenda of his own. Sparks fly, inside and outside the bedroom, as Nyla faces budding feelings and an enemy who is set to destroy everything she has ever worked for. It might be more difficult holding onto her crown than she thought before.

Hey. I'm William Johnston, but everyone calls me Will. I'm the captain of the Kensingburg Lions Hockey Team from Kensingburg Sports Univerity in Diamond Ring City. The season will start soon, and I can't wait. The thing is, my roommate is a little on the odd side (not that that's a bad thing). Read to find out what happens. 

------

Laura and Will are roommates. Laura is disguised as a boy. Will finds something in his roommate "Nick" that he finds indescribable. 

There's also Callie and Tami. Callie likes Will, and Tami is overly flirtatious, indecent, and way too forward.

Laura has her secrets, and there is always one person who wants to expose those secrets. 

------

DISCLAIMER: This story is *NOT* a gay romance like my other stories. 

DISCLAIMER #2: All places in this story are fake, and any similarities to places in our real world are just coincidences. 

DISCLAIMER #3: All characters in this story are fictional. Any similarities to people in real life, live or dead, is a coincidence. 

------

title: Kissing My Childhood Friend [slowly editing]
description:
W A R N I N G//: The first few chapters are terribly bumpy, but I can assure you that once you get past them, the story will gradually get better.

* * *

Hunter sat next to me in a chilled position, even the way he sat was sexy. And with every chance I got, I would stare at him.  Just when I promised myself this would be the last glance, Hunter caught my eyes and let out a chuckle. He started to lean closer to me, causing me to tilt back until I could feel the sofa arm against my back. So close that our lips could touch, I asked, with a shaky voice, "w-what're you doing?"

"Giving you a present," Hunter smiled slyly.

"Whatever it is, I don't want it," I said, lying. I wanted it badly. 

"Jen, don't lie." He then dropped a long and passionate kiss on my desperate lips, and all my thoughts faded away immediately. All my strength faded along when our tongues intertwined. With such an intense kiss, I gasped for air, but the kiss went on without a break.

* * *

Jennifer Anderson's life is both normal and successful. Her sister's wedding is just around the corner, and her boutique is practically booming with success. What better way to turn things upside down than to have her childhood friend, Hunter Manning, come back to town?

title: The Apartment
description:
Love can appear in the most unexpected of ways. Like a pizza, for example. 

In order for Rayleigh Brooks to pay for her freshman year of college, she and her best friend move into an apartment with three new roommates, all of whom are sophomore guys she doesn't really know. 

Amidst the unanticipated chaos of moving in, meeting her roommates, school starting, and ultimately changing the rest of her life forever, Ray can't help but feel pizza is the one constant she still has. But when she calls a local pizza place she endures an embarrassing conversation with the deep, amused voice on the other end of the phone. And the embarrassment only increases when Ray discovers the source of the sexy voice is one of her new roommates. 

This is a story about first love (realistic fiction), and entails drunken parties, hilarious roommates, and new experiences.

Excerpt:
I feel his eyes run over my party-ready state and something in my chest tightens. I study his face carefully, unable to look away even if I wanted to. I can almost feel his heated gaze on my skin as he runs his eyes up and down my body, his icy irises glinting with an unfamiliar expression that sets off something deep and molten in my core. There is a smoldering flame behind his cool blue eyes that is alight with a burning passion, and it makes my skin and blood and bones feel like the kindling to a fire waiting to be ignited. If he so much as moves or breathes or steps any closer, I am sure it will be the end of me. 

(Not completed, includes some cursing and is mildly graphic, so please don't read it if this bothers you)

As the owner of Petals & Posies, her flower shop in the heart of the city, she's found peace in the soft beauty of petals and blooms-until the cold, unyielding force of Lorenzo Hayes walks through her door. Lorenzo, a powerful CEO with a reputation for getting what he wants, has his eyes set on expanding his empire, and he sees potential in Lila's business. But Lila isn't interested in being another cog in his corporate machine. She's built her shop from the ground up, and she's determined to keep it that way.

When Lorenzo offers her a partnership, Lila resists, unwilling to compromise her independence. But as their paths continue to cross, she finds herself questioning everything she's worked for. Is it possible to grow without losing herself? And more importantly, is it possible to trust the man who could either be her greatest ally-or her downfall?

title: 31 days of pretend
description:
Mandy is every woman's ambition. Every man's desire. She has a glamour from head to toe, a face of an angel, a soft heart, a wit beyond measure, an influential career. She is the epitome of perfection. But behind these, is a woman hiding in sadness, longing for love and affection. Yes, she have everything but Greg.  
Greg, her husband of three years, whom she love eversince she saw him, never even laid an eye on her. He treated her like a non-existing matter.
For him, she was worst than trash.  
It shatter her heart into pieces when he asked for divorce. But she's so desperate to feel his love, to get his attention, to make her feel important. She agreed.
"I will give you the divorce you wanted in one condition,"
"What condition?"
"Love me for a month. Make me feel like our marriage is real. Treat me as your wife. Love me, even if it's fake..."

title: Skating on Thin Ice
description:
Skating on Thin Ice is a romance about Amara Taylor, a fiercely determined figure skater whose dreams of going professional have been riddled with setbacks. At a local gala, she performs under pressure, but a fall on the ice leaves her humiliated. In the audience is Liam Blackwell, a successful, self-made millionaire who sees more than just her misstep-he sees her passion and drive. Intrigued, Liam approaches her afterward, but Amara mistakes his encouragement for pity and pushes him away. Despite her initial resistance, the two are drawn together as Liam continues to offer his support, and a slow-burning romance begins. As they confront personal insecurities and their contrasting lifestyles, Amara and Liam discover that love and ambition can coexist. Both have to overcome fears, misunderstandings, and public scrutiny to finally embrace each other and their shared dreams.

title: Making Mr. Valois
description:
"In a couple of months I will be retiring and my son will be taking over, I need you to help him, train him" 

"Train him?" I asked incredulously. 

"Yes Ms. Petrova, train him, teach him how to be an assertive C.E.O. How to not take bullsh!t from anyone" 


When twenty-two years old, new college graduate, Alicia Petrova received a job offer to work at Valois Incorporated, one of the biggest fortune 500 companies in the world, she couldn't believe her luck. To add icing to the cake, she is offered the secretary position for the C.E.O, himself, Mr. Valois or at least future C.E.O. Mr. Valois Jr. However after her first day on the job, she quickly realizes that it may demand more than she anticipated or was prepared for. 

Charles Valois Jr. (Chase) is known as the most talked about man in New York. Why? Because everyone wants a peak into this mysterious man's life. All the public knows about him is that he is the oldest child of multi-billionaire Charles Valois and successor to the Valois Empire. He is never seen with a beautiful new mistress on his arm or attending fancy events or racing yachts off the coast of Monaco, like many of his counterpart. His existence could be a myth for all they knew and that's exactly the way he wants it. However, when his father hires strong-willed, adamant and self-assured Alicia Petrova to make him into the ruthless C.E.O. the world expects him to be, what he wants and what he gets will become immensely different.


What happens when two stubborn souls are put together?
 Arguments, glaring, some name calling and maybe some romance.

But will they let themselves welcome the attraction that electrifies the air between them or will they fight because Alicia needs to do what's safe and Chase needs confront his demons.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"It's strange because sometimes, I read a book, and I think I am the people in the book." -Stephen Chbosky
Let me see...
I am 23 and  in college as a mechanical engineering major so I often don't have a lot of free time. Any free time I get is spent here though.
I wrote my first story when I was eight and I love writing ever since then.
I love the forbidden romance stuff, I find it so exciting. I am secretly a hopeless romantic... well it's not much of a secret anymore.

I like horror novels but I can't read them because I'm a wimp. I absolutely adore fantasy novels. I am often blown away by how creative people are. I have a tendency to forget that I am reading a book so I often get too attach to the characters.

I can't even explain how much I love writing, it just gives me this bubbly happy feeling.  I'm not limited to only one genre, I usually write whatever comes to my head except horror.  Stephen King already dominated that.

If I am not writing, reading or doing school work. I'm with friends, cosplaying, going to the movies, playing video game and/or watching anime,  in other words being the ultimate nerd/geek.
I love the color purple.
Mantra: whatever I can't create through science, i can through literature.


Well read, vote, comment, follow. If you want me to read your story then just ask. If I don't have the time I will let you know but if I do I will most definitely check out your book and give honest feedback.
No read for read or follow for follow though.

title: Best Friends?
description:
Kyle's tired.

Very tired.

He hates how Stan clings to him while he was drunk and cries all night about why Wendy keeps on breaking up with him and why it feels like something is always a missing in his life.

He hates it.

Because.... he's scared.

He's seeing something coming out from this.

Yet, he doesn't acknowledge it.

He will never acknowledge it.

He's already hurt enough.

.......

Why?

Every night, you cling to me and cry about her yet the next day your just back on her grasp all over again. You allow her to use you. You allow her to hurt you. And... In the process of hurting you, she's hurting me too.

They might ask...

'Why don't you just help him? Make him get away from that Wendy? You love him right?'

And I can just smile sadly while saying my number one excuse.

"I'm his best friend"
Tous Droits Réservés

what can happen when tragedy strikes and changed Quinns aspect of life, going from the cheery, happy girl to the girl who can no longer see any happiness in her future, but will that change when Theo is thrown into the mix? will he help her try to live again or will he leave her be? read and you'll find out.

title: Her Controlling CEO
description:
Sean Kelly is your average CEO. Young and handsome, rich and mysterious. So many women throw themselves at him on a daily basis. So why is it that he does not seem to be happy? Until the day he stumbled into the cafe and bumped into Rebekah Reynolds. 

Rebekah is short and lean, her long mass of curly hair was thick, dark and shiny. Oh what he would give to have his hands wrapped in that hair. Her lips were full and luscious..totally kissable. She had a waist and hips that ran together so good it would drive any man crazy, he just had to have her.

Rebekah had never seen a man so glorious. He was ravishing in his navy suit.  She wasn't like the other women he'd been with. She wasn't model skinny or rich and dashing, her skin was to pale, her hair way to thick she thought, and she had light freckles that speckled ever so slightly around her face.

So what happens when Rebekah and Sean start bumping into each other more often? Will they end up together?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: 5 star recruit
description:
Zachary Gray has been praised and celebrated for his football talent throughout his high school career, landing him the grade of five star recruit. Through unforseen surcomstances he ends up going to ECU, a small college on the other side of the country that is known having one of the worst football programs in the country. Luckily for him he doesn't have to do it alone, he finds an equally passionate person in Lauren Turner is fighting for both her job and respect as a female football coach. Marcus Jackson who is as dedicated to the game as he is. A cute medical student Rebecca who seems to be quite taken by him. And several other people along the way that will shape his college career and life going forward, for good or bad.

title: The Anti-Love Pact
description:
Tina and Noah both experience painful breakups around the same time. In an effort to help each other heal, they enter in to a pact to protect each other from getting hurt from love again. Their Anti-Love Pact includes a set of rules like, no dating, no serious relationships, and to focus on self-growth instead. As roommates, they decide to embark on this healing journey together. However, as time passes, the validity of the pact is questioned as they wonder if this is holding them back from finding love where they least expect it - with each other.

title: Shoot Your Shot (On Hold)
description:
When you take too long to decide where you live your second year at university, you get stuck with what is left and may get some unwanted surprise, I learned that the hard way. When you think about it, being the only girl living with three boys would be the dream... Well, not when you are stuck with the cockiest and disrespectful man ever, Luke Bailey. His only quality is that he's friends with my ex-crush, which I'm not really sure is a good thing.

A story filled with drama, surprising friendships, and romance Alexis had given up all hopes on. 

Keep in mind it's the first draft. I'll go over it again once I'm done. 
Enjoy your reading and don't forget to give feedback. 

Updating on April 17, due to my exams! Love you

Then Marcus met Hannah. He warned her about guys like him, but Hannah knows better. She knows her new best friend is so much more than an empty womanizer.

title: Mr CEO's PA
description:
When she moved to Chicago, Isabelle Lane never really had a plan for her life other than rebranding herself, but suddenly being thrown into the position of the city's hottest CEO's PA was definitely not part of the equation. Daniel Hawthorne is mature, wild and contrary. He embodies the opposite of everything that Seth (her ex who is not to be mentioned) is. 

Add in a controlling best friend and Daniel's mischievous wingman to the mix of being occupied by her busy job and a boss with a mood wild enough to give her whiplash, dealing with the ghosts locked in her head has never been this hard.

This is no love story, this a story of how a young woman finds strength to be herself amidst the out of the blue ins and heartbreaking outs of love.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: But Beautiful
description:
Samuel Kennedy is a wealthy, down to earth and popular business man in Detroit. Women have come from near and far to try and win a chance with the British bachelor. What happens when a small town girl, Marilyn Kerr, leaves her small town home in Redwood, Michigan to travel three hours away to become his secretary? She's beautiful, sweet and intelligent, she's different, and that makes the chase all the more exciting.

title: The Light That Shines Within(Sneak Peek)
description:
Lily Thomas is used to being a part of the middle class society. She lives off of cups of noodles and thrift store finds. Her weapon is her sharp tongue and fluent sarcasm. She has gotten complacent with her lack luster life. 

Everything changes when Matt Bonner enters the picture. He comes from generations of money. He lives his life hard and fast. His good looks serve him well. 

Now working with Matt , there's an unspoken tension between the two. Lily let's her guard down for one night and gives into it. Now she holds onto a secret for all of the rest of the nights to come. 

Lily has to find her way. She pushes through and finds the light at the end of the tunnel. It comes from within.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Homeschooling mama of two little boys. When I'm not pulling my hair out, I like to indulge in my side passion of writing and reading. title: Newfound Love/r

Lorraine Clavinely works for the big Harrollaw Advertising Company. She is considered to be a hopeless romantic due to the fact that she 's 26 and still have no one to share her life with but she also likes to deny that adjective. She loves to be in love and does not care of the people going in and out of her life. 

Bradley Harrollaw is the new big boss and potential new lover of whoever his secretary is going to be. He is used to all the attention the ladies are giving him and does not hide the fact that he indeed love women. 

He wasn't expecting to be put into place by a certain woman while she wants nothing to do with him.

title: The moon is lovely
description:
Helene has been set up on blind dates since she started university. She did her best to balance it with college while simultaneously keeping her double life a secret from everyone.

Born into a rich family but living the most modest life, all she asks for is to be trusted enough by her father to live her life the way she wants to without his nagging. For that, she started to disguise herself on her dates and do her best to make the other parties reject her until her father give up on trying finding her a potential husband. Three years have already passed, and he hasn't given up yet. How long would he still go with it? Is there a better plan to accelerate the process?

title: The Lucky One
description:
Afraid of losing someone again, Chase deprived himself from making his life happy and choosing to be miserable. He made Mara's life a living hell the moment he caught a glimpse of her innocent smile. He kept pushing her away when she's slowly getting under his skin. 

When Mara learns the reason behind his past, through her caring nature she dragged him to cope up and see the brighter side of life. When everything seems to be falling into places again, Chase is yet again haunted by his past, igniting his very own fear--losing the person he learned to love more than anything else.

title: Trapped Destinies
description:
Trapped unfurls the captivating odyssey of Kayla, a young woman ensnared in life's intricate web of challenges. When a chance encounter with a young boy named Apollo thrusts her into the role of his temporary guardian, Kayla finds herself navigating a labyrinth of secrets and familial connections. Amidst the turmoil, a passionate bond ignites between Kayla and Atlas, Apollo's hot enigmatic father, leading her down a path of forbidden desire and unexpected revelations. As Kayla confronts her own inner demons and embraces her newfound responsibilities, she embarks on a poignant journey of self-discovery, unearthing the depths of compassion and the resilience within.  All while navigating the challenges of building her own business and asserting her independence as a powerful woman.

title: Icebound Hearts
description:
When two rival hearts tangle themselves in one another, when push comes to shove and sacrifices have to be made, what will they choose?

Lizzie Myers a Junior at Meadow ridge university is both beauty and brains. Being the hotshot of her campus she has lots of guys throwing themselves at her but she only has eyes on one thing and one thing only and that's completing her degree in biology, growing up with a poor family she prioritized her academics and now in college she still does. 

But when she meets the captain of the rival hockey team Luke Becket, her priorities change.

Luke Beckett a incoming power force in the hockey world who wants to go sign with the Vancouver vipers to excel past his fathers footsteps but he has an obstacle in his path when he meets Lizzie Myers from his rival school.

When all is said and done opposites attract.

title: The Quarterbacks Kiss
description:
Eve Beckett, the girl with a broken soul. She has just transferred into Pembroke College as a sophomore, craving a fresh start after a rocky freshman year. Growing up in an abusive home with an absent mother and an violent father, Eve is set on never falling in love, using dance as her way of escape from reality. What happens when she bumps into a familiar face on campus, who gave her a bad impression?

Carson Blake, the school golden boy. The quarterback of Pembroke college has a perfect life, a perfect family, he's got girls at every turn and is undeniably attractive. But he still feels that biting feeling in his heart that he's felt since he was a kid. In the Blake family, carrying the Blake name makes or breaks your position in the family. What will happen when the stress gets to Carson? 

Is there such thing as soulmates? And do Carson and Eve fit the criteria? Can they handle just being friends? 

And when hardships come in the way, rude families, ex crushes, the past. Can they make it out alive?

Read to find out more about Eve and Carson's story.

Third book in the 'Winning Hearts' series BUT can be read as a standalone.

title: His Possession In Discretion | ✓ - DISCRETION SERIES BOOK #1
description:
Brielle Newman
A 21-year-old girl who was struggling to make life comfortable for herself and her niece, Delilah. Her sister left the baby the minute she could get up and leave the hospital. Brielle hasn't seen her since. She also hasn't seen her parents who walked out on her at 17 or her brother who went to the army and hasn't contacted her for 9 months in counting. Being all by herself she's desperately trying to give Delilah a life she never got to experience. 

Killian Russell
A 24-year-old ruthless CEO who doesn't tolerate negligence or stupidity. He wouldn't blink an eye before firing someone who worked for him for years. Make one mistake and you're done. His parents were extremely proud of his success. He never had a stable relationship. He was once a hit it and quit it guy but now he just lays low as most women throw themselves at him just for his money. Being the richest man in the northeast and second richest in the country he has no time for love.

When he finds little Delilah ordering a coffee, he follows her out. She takes him to Brielle, who instantly made something click in Killian, changing their lives forever.

Disclaimer: This book is more so about fluff, comedy, and drama (I wrote it as a literal teenager). If you are looking for a bit more ✨spice✨, check out the other books within the Discretion Series. 

WARNING: THIS BOOK CONTAINS MATURE CONTENT AND EXPLICIT LANGUAGE. READ AT YOUR OWN RISK.

IF YOU ARE NOT A FAN OF CONTROLLING MEN AND A SEMI-SUBMISSIVE FEMALE LEAD, THIS BOOK IS NOT FOR YOU! I REPEAT, PLEASE DO NOT ENTER THIS BOOK WITH THE INTENTION OF ALREADY NOT LIKING IT AND LEAVING HATE COMMENTS.

title: When We Write the Stars
description:
College senior, Cassie Bennet has spent the past few years working as hard as possible to ensure she's able to fulfil her dream of becoming an astrophysicist. Now at the start of the year, she just has one last general university requirement to fulfil in order to graduate in the spring. The 'easy A' class she chooses is a film soundtracks class, but what should be an easy way to boost her GPA becomes a struggle when Hayden West, the captain of the hockey team who couldn't care less about his grades is assigned to be her partner on a project for the entire quarter. Now they're forced to spend the next few months watching and analyzing romance movies together. Suddenly it's not just the movies that have her swooning, but a distraction like Hayden is the last thing she needs right now... right?

title: GOLDEN GIRL
description:
BOOK 1: FALCON FAMILY SERIES

In a world of wealth, power, and family feuds, Shay Falcon fights to break free from the shadows of her billionaire dynasty. The youngest daughter of the renowned Falcon Group's CEO, her life is a blend of neglect, sibling rivalry, and the suffocating pressure to conform. But beneath her fragile facade, Shay craves independence and forges a secret path as a secretary at the illustrious C&E Holdings, a company owned by her family's bitter rivals.

Just when Shay believes she has found solace in her hidden sanctuary, fate intervenes, thrusting her into a tumultuous whirlwind. The enigmatic Jason Cartwright and the charismatic Chase Evans, the powerful bosses of C&E Holdings, uncover Shay's clandestine identity. Their shocking discovery sets in motion a chain of events that will shatter the fragile facade of her life.

In the heart of the cutthroat corporate battlefield, where power is a weapon and loyalty a luxury, Shay Falcon's life becomes a gripping tale of survival and redemption. Can she transcend her tainted lineage and reshape her destiny, or will the weight of her family's legacy consume her? Prepare to be captivated by a story where ambition collides with fate, and the untamed spirit of a young woman defies all odds.

title: Bound
description:
College senior Kate Camden has learned to adapt - to her last year of school, to the promise of motherhood, to the fact that she's doing it all alone. But just when she's learned to adjust, heartache threatens to break her apart.
Pro hockey player Jason "Ryke" Ryker has it all: adoring fans, a promising career, and a beautiful wife. But when his seemingly perfect life is shaken by tragedy, he's left questioning whether having it all is ever more than an illusion.
When circumstance brings Kate and Ryke together, they discover they don't have to hurt alone. Bound by a grief that haunts them both, they must rely on one another to survive heartbreak. But that grief is more powerful than they realize, and the tie that binds them together may ultimately tear them apart.
**Warning** This book contains adult language and situations.

title: LOVE ON A TOUR (LOAT) #wattys2020
description:
Dr. Sophia Taylor, 25 year old girl from India, is a very talented and smart doctor. For her patients, she is similar to their God. Just her smile makes thousands of men fall for her. But for her, love is not for her. It's not her thing actually. She just wants to stay strong, independent and with full freedom. She wants to spend her life in serving the needy and poor. She has a rule in life and that is to stay away from love. She has many friends who are boys, but no boyfriend. Sophia gets a chance to visit the NYC for a seminar. She decides to visit places nearby NYC too. It was just a casual tour for her.


Mr. Christian Wright, 26 years old from NYC, is the most eligible bachelor in the world. He is smart and sexy as hell. He is just like a Greek God. Girls swoon over him. He is a playboy and stays away from even the talks of marriage. His playboy life is what he likes the most.

But what will happen when he finally bumps into the Sophia and is smitten by her beauty and intelligence? 

Two different persons, two different cultures, two different traditions, two different countries and even two different continents. Love will make them learn many new things and have many new adventures in life. Their love story will not be just a fairy tale one. It would be something different.

So to know about their stories, keep reading ......

"LOVE ON A TOUR (LOAT)".

title: DateTheCEO.com
description:
"You're not about to carry me out in bridal style again, are you?"

"Do you want me to?" He couldn't help but smirk. Her face from their date surfaced in his memories. He found it just as amusing as back then. Revenge never tasted sweeter. Would she make the same reaction right now? 

It was tempting but the venue wasn't the best place for it.

"No!" Eve protested a little too loudly. She pressed her fingers against her mouth and scanned the premise. As she predicted, hundreds of eyes watched them. A groan escaped her lips. She buried her face on the side of his chest, inhaling his cologne.

"Are you sure?" Ambryan asked, genuinely concerned now. He held her chin and raised it. His violet eyes met her hazel ones. The blush on her cheeks had magnified in saturation. He couldn't tell anymore if it came from embarrassment or the alcohol.

Either way, it intrigued him on how much redder she could possibly be.

He leaned down and whispered in her ear. "I'd be gentle this time."

==============

Eve faced the most difficult decision in her life when an opportunity landed on her desk. And that is? To join a special dating site for the most eligible bachelor of the country,

Her boss.

As a secretary, Eve knew affiliations between her and her boss were forbidden. She must stay in his shadow where she didn't pose a threat to his lovers and his admirers. She had taken measures to fit the job, even changing her style of appearance. 

Ambryan Hathaway, CEO of Eros Productions, disliked false information. The only ones he allowed were the ones he initiated himself. In order to please his mother, he had participated in the game of love with a string of flings. 

Unfortunately, his mother had enough. She must find a way for him to open his eyes and his heart to meeting the right girl. That one spark would be enough for her son to consider marriage.

And who would be the better candidate than his own secretary? 

==============

title: How to love
description:
"Forgive me, Mr Hayes but a girl doesn't want thousands of dollars spent upon her. A simple goodwill, heartfelt gesture is enough to make a woman turn into a puddle of goo." I nervously fiddle with the hem of my risen skirt and I clear my throat. "If a woman wants your money - then it's not love." 

He pushes himself from the large oak desk he was resting upon and walks forward causing my temperature to rise and a strangled breath catch in my throat. His hands grasp the chairs arm on either side of me and my toes curled within my high heels. 

"Then teach me, Miss Field." He speaks, dipping his head to catch my nervous gaze. "Give me lessons on how to love." 

|||

Miss Francesca Fields, also known as Frankie, has read one too many romantic novels, watched one too many romantic movies and dreams too much about the glorious, old fashioned romance. She has kissed many frogs, but she has yet to find her prince. 

When overhearing her wealthy bosses, gold digging girlfriend boast about her latest mercedes convertible with all expenses charged to Mr Hayes' business card, Francesca can't help but rant towards a work colleague about her thoughts on the matter. 

What she didn't expect was to be then summoned to the office of her boss and CEO, Jason Hayes, within minutes after the conversation. 

Expecting to be fired on the spot, Francesca was completely stunned at Mr Hayes offer. 

Could she really give her boss lessons on how to love?

title: A Tormented Heart
description:
#194 in Romance (14/08/16)

"You are just a spoilt, overindulged little brat!" His ocean blue eyes flashed contempt.
"And you are a rude, arrogant, chauvinistic brute!" She spat, tossing flame coloured curls over her shoulder. 
"Then we have nothing further to say to each other!"
"No!"
"Good! Goodbye!"
"GOODBYE!"

***
Cecilia Rose Knight is used to attracting admiring looks and covetous glances - a necessary evil when your father is richer than Croesus. Being the baby of the family, Cecilia is used to getting her way more often than not; but there's one thing that has remained ever elusive to her: love.  Nevertheless, she's pretty certain she knows what type of guy she's going to fall in love with: warm, kind, open. Until, of course, HE comes along, and shatters everything she's ever believed in...

A self made billionaire, Nicolas Freire has no time or energy for spoilt little princesses. He just wants to do a business deal with Cecilia's father, after which he will become the mogul of his own empire. But, for some reason he can't seem to leave the red-haired vixen well enough alone...

When two stubborn, hard headed individuals collide, the ride is sure to be nothing short of tempestuous. And the heart is sure to be just a little tormented...

BOOK 1 IN "A DESTINED LOVE" TRILOGY 

(Previously known as 'A tempestuous heart')

MY BILLION DOLLAR LOVE

"Oh stop it. What do you want Kaden? You think I made a mistake to reject your proposal back then? I don't think so, I don't give a fu*k whether you care for me or not, just remember we are together for this project or else I wouldn't be tolerating you for a minute" I said, glaring at him
"Ohhh.. Did I hurt you Miss Williams? I was beginning to think you have transformed in a stone. You do have some emotions left it seems.You know what Aanya, that is exactly why people hate you so much at your office." He said with fake mockery.
"Oh really. I'm happy that they hate me on my face, unlike you who pretended to care but actually don't." I retorted, and i saw his flicker a little bit, hurt flashed through his eyes, but it was gone as quickly as it came. 
But, before he can say anything else I cut him and continue...
"Don't bother to reply Kaden. Just get out of my house and close the door after leaving" with that I went to my room and locked it.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

AANYA WILLIAMS is a strong and heartless architect who owns a firm named Grace.Inc.
She is 26 yrs strong lady and there is just one thing she wants right now which is to grab the project from Radiance.Inc that is worth Billion Dollars. If she gets this projects she'll become the best architectural firm. 

KADEN FORD. A architect himself who is a C.E.O. of Ford Architect.Inc. He wants to become the best architect in their world and he will. Even he is trying the grab the project from Radiance.Inc. and he sure will cause this project will make his firm the best architectural firm in the world.

How will Aanya react when she is forced to work with Kaden, the person she hates with all her might. 
How will fate work for them? Will they fall in love or the hate increases?


Lets find out what FATE has written for them. 
----------------

title: Counting Down The Days (Counting on Hockey #3)
description:
During their senior year of high school, after 2 years of dating, they were the golden couple that everyone envied. Cole was captain of the hockey team, and had scholarship to University of Maine for hockey. 

Cole and Meredith are going to move into a house with Noah. They are all best friends and they couldn't be happier all together again. Noah's in sophomore year and Cole and Meredith are starting their freshman year in college. 

Now, here comes sophomore year for Meredith and Cole. At one of Cole's games, a recruiter for the Minnesota Wild is there. He likes what he sees from #19. That would be Cole. The NHL draft is soon approaching. The draft comes and Cole is drafted into the Minnesota Wild. Which means he has to move to Minneapolis to play. Noah is drafted into the Boston Bruins, he has to move to Boston. Noah wouldn't be as far, but Meredith would be without her best friend, but not to mention her boyfriend. 

It also means Cole has to leave Meredith. He doesn't want to, but this is his new job, and she needs to finish school. He comes home once every couple months, when he has the time. 

Meredith needs to decide whether she finishes school, or she quits school for a while and moves to Minnesota with Cole. That's a very hard decision for her. But she knows what she wants to do. It's just whether her mind wants to follow her heart.

title: Traffic at the Pier
description:
"As I close the bathroom door behind me I see Luke just sitting in Vanessa's bed looking down at his phone
'Ahem' I say and he looks up at me 
'What are you doing in my room and where's Vanessa?' I say in a harsher tone than i intended
 
'Oh, i killed her, she's in the closet I was just waiting for you to come out and kill you too' usually I would laugh at his joke but not after what he did

'Well can you please get out?, I'm going to get dressed' he shakes his head and lays down in the bed I huff and decide to not put up a fight with him.

I get a tank top and shorts with a (bra and underwear of course) and I head back to the bathroom.

When I'm all changed and moisturized I walk back out and lay on my bed.

I feel a pair of eyes on me and I turn around and catch Luke looking straight at me but he looks back at his phone quickly.

'If you have to say something to me tell me, Vanessa is not gonna be here anytime soon anyway so might as well'

He catches me off guard by immediately standing up and sitting close to me in my bed, a little too close..."

title: A Charitable Scandal
description:
*COMPLETE*

Alexis "Lex" Jeffries has survived her fair share of quick spin stories and opulent company events during her years in Quinto Technologies' Public Relations Department. However, none of it could prepare her for being tasked with marketing an extravagant charity gala in only a month.  To make matters worse, she has to do it alongside her handsome and charming manager, Alec Radcliffe.

With his rugged maturity, sweet compliments, and warm smile, Lex finds herself torn between the implications behind their office flirtations and her suspicions about what secrets might be lingering behind a surprise gala for a fledgling charity that seems to exist in name alone.

Her work ethic and moral code will have to combat a nosy reporter, a vindictive ex-lover, and a shady mannequin if she hopes to hit the dance floor both gainfully employed and blissfully in love.

title: You'll never have me
description:
Mira Prasad, a woman in her early twenties works as a secretary for a construction company. One day she meets Max Woods after another night out. Max owns his own company and it turns out that the company she works for, is collaborating with Woods inc. 
Max finds Mira very intriguing and wants to go out with her, but Mira isn't keen about wealthy men like  Max. Because of their companies collaborating, she is forced to keep in contact with him.
He however is determined to conquer her heart and prove to her he is the very opposite of what she thinks about him and make her his.
Will Max succeed and win Mira's heart?
When he finally gets closer to her, his ex girlfriend, Claire, who is also Mira's friend, is trying to mess things up.
Meanwhile Mira is struggling to find her way to deal with her mother's mental illness and her father and brother who make everything ten times more difficult. They don't like the way how Mira lives her life and they definitely don't approve of her and Max dating. 
Just when Mira is ready to commit to Max, his past catches on to him and a ghost from the past is there to get his revenge.
Is Mira, who struggles with trust issues and relationships in general, going to open up her heart to him? Will they ever find each other?

title: Redemption (Rewriting)
description:
Sawyer Price finally escaped her childhood home. Her dad is after her, and he'll stop at nothing to get her back. So, she drives until she ends up at her brother Fletcher's house. They haven't seen each other since they were kids, and now that she's standing on his doorstep, covered in blood, he's determined to keep her safe. Even if it's from people like his best friend. 

Football player, Carter Ames, lives exactly two doors down from Sawyer. He quickly becomes fascinated with the curly-haired girl who's determined to keep herself hidden away from the real world. He knows she has secrets and a past she isn't proud of, but he does too, and he's willing to help her. Except he didn't mean to fall for her, even if the first time he saw her made the heavens collide with the earth. 

So, they keep their friendship a secret. 

The more Carter tries to understand her, the more she pushes him away. He doesn't understand her, and she isn't willing to open up about her past. She's more afraid of what he'll think of her when he finds out, and it's not something she's willing to face. 

But secrets can only stay hidden for so long, and Sawyer won't have much of a choice when her father shows up looking for her. Will she reach out for help, or will she run? Because Sawyer has an escape plan, and Carter isn't willing to see her go, but good things always have to come to an end. 

Right?

Isa Kincaid can't remember the exact moment she began hating Julian West, just that she does - vehemently. It doesn't help that Julian harbours similar feelings towards Isa, either. In a moment of weakness where Isa allows her anger to get the better of her, she makes a bet with Julian to see who can gain the most popularity over the school year. His infuriating nature paired with his golden charm makes Julian a formidable enemy, but Isa is determined to take him down. A little healthy competition never hurt anyone, right? 

As they begin spending more time with one another, Isa unwittingly starts to realise that Julian may not be as bad as she once thought. Strangely, he's always there when she needs someone and believes in her like no one ever has before. Isa can't shake the terrifying feeling that things are changing between them, but for better or for worse, she can't decide.

Love is (not) easy.

title: Changing For Her
description:
I am Marco Lombardi. You may know me as being the captain of the soccer team and star of girls' fantasies. I'm am able to convince a girl to drop her clothes without me even breaking a sweat. Life is pretty good for me . . . Until a girl messed it up. Let me explain, a new girl walks into my class and I think it'll be the same old routine: I sweet talk to her, establish a little skin contact, convince her to come to the Janitor's closet, establish a lot of skin contact, and BOOM! I add another girl to my list. But boy, was I wrong. Here is a section of our first words to each other.

" 'Let me tell you, you're awfully lucky that you're so beautiful because I don't usually let New Yorkers sit by me,' I whisper smoothly, using a voice girls tell is irresistible.

'You call it lucky, I call it unfortunate.' And with that, she looks away toward the board."

This is going to be harder than I thought but no way this girl will change me.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm 100 % pure Italian. The genuine kind, not the guidos in America like the Jersey Whores. I'm talking about the romantic, futbol crazed Italians. Boston is my new home since I was Sixteen. Just like any other Bostonian, I HATE the Yankees. Don't even talk about them.

I love any book about Futbol (soccer) but I usually like it from a guy's perspective. No dude wants to read as a chick. My absolute favorite story on Wattpad is the Bro Code. Speaking of bros, I feel like the only one out here. Where you at guys? I'm a lone bro right now.

My friends call me Barney because they say I am exactly like Barney Stinson from How I Met Your Mother. I take that as a compliment. I am indeed Awesome and Legend-wait for it. I hope you aren't  lactose intolerant because the next word is-Dary! Legendary!

Italy, Red Sox, Futbol, Barney . . . yep, that basically summarizes me. Oh, and I am also 18 years old.

title: It's Known As Complicated
description:
Alexis Farrow, your typical 22 year old. Smart, clumsy and has a heart of gold. Struggling to keep up with what life throws at her while trying to still live life to the fullest. Unfortunately, life has a way of fooling around with her. Every moment life gets to embarrass her, it takes it. Even though she feels like she's constantly being knocked down she has her mind set on something, making something of herself. 
 
Mariano Maxwell, he scares any man who dares to argue with him. His intimidating yet powerful exterior seals any deal. His gorgeous physique and dominating personality makes it hard for the women to resist, with just a snap of his fingers he has women lining up for him. He is said to be heartless, arrogant and always gets what he wants. Nothing else matters to him, why should it? It's his way or no way. 

But what will happen when Alexis and Mariano keep crossing paths, irritating each other to no limit. Will they be able to ignore the slight attraction that surfaces each time they are forced by fate to meet again. There is only so much they can do to prevent what is meant to be, whether they like it or not.

title: The Hopeless Romantic
description:
Jane Beckett recently graduated college with a marketing degree and is ready to start her new career. She applies at Greene Industries for an intern position and gets offered a position as the CEO's personal assistant instead. Although the position isn't what she was aiming for, the salary and experience are desperately needed. She decides to take the job with the promise that she can get extra training by sitting in on marketing meetings and meeting once a week with the marketing team. She can't deny the fact that her boss is attractive on an otherworldly level, but she reminds herself that she must remain professional if she wants a future with this company. Besides, Mr. Greene is far too rich and important to ever even consider dating his personal assistant. 

Lee Greene is the CEO of Greene Industries and heir to his family's wealth. He has a reputation for being the bad playboy type of guy, but he's rich, so he can do whatever he wants, right? His attitude begins to change the day that Jane walks into his conference room for an interview. He can't put his finger on it, but something about this woman is appealing in a way Lee has never known before. He decides to hire her as his assistant so that he can get to know her better. Bit by bit, Lee finds himself more than a little attracted to Jane despite trying to convince himself that she is just another woman. He's had plenty of women in his lifetime; why was this one any different?

As Jane and Lee's relationship begins to heat up, secrets from a darker past find their way back into the spotlight.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Living in the peach state, I enjoy photography, painting, writing, reading, and going to church. I am a single mother with the sweetest four year old boy in the world! I am currently in college for my marketing degree, and I can't wait to achieve that goal. I am still young and very much figuring out life and how to love myself and embrace freedom.

title: From Friends to Forever
description:
Ava Sinclair and Ethan Grant have been best friends since they were teenagers, sharing life's highs and lows, dreams and laughter. Ava, a spirited photographer with a knack for finding beauty in the unexpected, and Ethan, a charming chef known for his daring culinary fusions, are perfect together in every way-except that neither will admit it. While everyone around them sees what they could be, Ava and Ethan keep their bond safely in the "friend zone," each afraid to risk losing the other.

But a fateful road trip changes everything, sparking a chemistry that lingers long after they return. Just as Ava considers confessing her feelings, Ethan's ex-girlfriend, Cassie, reappears, throwing her heart into turmoil and testing their friendship. Ava's struggle to understand her emotions brings her closer to Ethan, even as her fears of rejection and heartbreak threaten to pull her away. With the help of her younger sister, Ava starts to find the courage to explore what her heart has known all along.

When Ethan realizes he's falling for his best friend, they finally confront the truth between them.

From Friends to Forever is a heartfelt story of friendship, love, and the courage to take a leap of faith, perfect for anyone who believes in the magic of finding love right where you least expected it.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to the chaos! 🎉

So, who am I, you ask? Well, imagine an introverted hopeless romantic who's living in a constant daydream, fueled by caffeine, K-pop, and the unreasonable hope that one day I'll accidentally bump into my bias at a coffee shop and spill my latte on them. Sounds unrealistic? Yeah, it totally is. But hey, life goes on-and so do my daydreams. (Bonus points if you sang that in your head like a true ARMY.)

             Now, let's get something straight-I may be an introvert, but when it comes to my biases, I can scream louder than the mics at a K-pop concert. And trust me, that's loud. I'm talking "Jungkook just posted a selca" levels of loud. In my defense, have you seen those boys? It's impossible to stay calm.

         You see, when I'm not busy fangirling over K-pop, I'm hard at work (and by work, I mean daydreaming) about ridiculously cute scenarios that will probably never happen. Like, imagine this: I'm at a BTS fan meeting, and Jin tells me one of his world-famous dad jokes. We lock eyes, and suddenly, we're both laughing hysterically-cue the romantic slow-motion zoom in, a cheesy K-drama soundtrack, and the realization that we're meant to be. Ridiculous? Totally. But in my head? It's basically canon. 😌💖
    Speaking of Jin's dad jokes (and believe me, I've got a few of my own), here's one for you:
    Why doesn't BTS ever get lost? Because they always have ARMY to guide them! 💪🌍
   Now, let's address the elephant in the room: my bias. It's a sensitive topic, okay? I mean, some days I'm all about Suga's swag and savage one-liners, and other days I'm weak for Hobi's smile that could light up an entire stadium.
    So, if you're like me-an introverted hopeless romantic with a K-pop obsession and a talent for making up wildly unrealistic scenarios-then welcome aboard!
     What did the K-pop fan say after hearing their favorite song live? I think I've Seoul-ed my heart to this group!❤️

(I'll see myself out now. 😎)

title: Jab They Met
description:

Aditya Singhania - a self-made business tycoon, the CEO of a leading textile business, who believes in himself  more than anyone around him.
His childhood lessons taught him not to trust someone easily, and his struggles made him acquainted with the harsh reality of life from an early age. 
Being the only man in his home he took the responsibility of his mother and sister, ignoring  his own priorities sometimes.
Other than his own family, he believes people approach you only for two reasons, either for their own profit, or to destroy you ;for which he refrains himself from getting close to anyone. 
People call it his arrogance ,while he prefers it as his own safety. 

So what will happen when a girl from nowhere will appear in his life, invading his space and will question him for his regulations ?
Will he let her go that easily after daring to go against him?
A girl who loves to live her life in a way, he exactly hates. 
A girl who highly believes in love, will she be able to bear a man like him? 

Get ready to ride a rollercoaster of hate and love with Aditya and Pihu. 

........
Read, vote and comment.!!

title: Falling into Friendship: A Roommate Romance
description:
Emma and Jake, two college students with extremely different interests, find their lives intertwined when they become roommates. Emma is a passionate creative writing student, dreaming of publishing a novel, while Jake is a spirited business major with a love for soccer and music. As they navigate their shared space, their initial differences become the foundation for a deepening friendship. Through late-night study sessions, random weekend adventures, and heartfelt conversations, they discover that their bond is evolving in unexpected ways.
 " Falling into friendship:A Roommate Romance": explores the journey of two individuals as they navigate the delicate transition from close friends to something more, all while managing the ups and downs of college life. This heartwarming story is about the beauty of finding love in the most unexpected places and the joy of growing together.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Augustine, and I'm really happy to share my stories with you. Writing is something I've always liked, and now I'm doing it just for fun.

I enjoy making up characters and thinking of new ideas for stories. Writing helps me share my thoughts and feelings, and I hope my stories can connect with you.

Since I'm new to this, I'm still learning and trying out different ways to write. I like writing about things that are easy to relate to, whether it's something fun or something with a bit more feeling.

I'm grateful to everyone who reads my work. Your support helps me get better as a writer. I'm here to have fun and share my stories, and I hope you enjoy them as much as I enjoy writing them.

Thank you for reading! Let's see where these stories take us.

title: Unexpected Goal
description:
August "Auggie" Miller has always had two constants: soccer and his team. But this season, his life takes a sudden turn when Helen Jackson, the spirited photographer for the soccer team, begins to catch his eye in a way he can't ignore. Unbeknownst to him, Helen has admired Auggie for years, quietly capturing his every move from behind the lens. Now, with the team off to their best season yet, the two are finally brought together, sharing moments both on and off the field.

As their friendship deepens into something more, they're faced with an unexpected surprise that will test their young love in ways they never imagined. Balancing team dynamics, hidden rivalries, and a life-changing secret, Auggie and Helen must navigate the biggest challenges they've ever faced, all while holding onto the thrill of first love. Will they be able to stay together as their worlds change around them, or will the pressure be too much?

title: The Bad Boy Who Saved Me
description:
Have you ever felt so lonely even tho you have people with you, who love you. I feel that everyday, I never wanted to but I guess this is a game the guy up there wants me to play. I didn't want to ever wanna be like this but the dude yo there did. 
       
         People think they know me but they don't. There's something wrong with me. I'm not as innocent as I look. 

        I was drowning and no one noticed until a certain bad boy named Ryder Martinez turned the corner of Liberty High School. He saw someone as he turned and I never thought it would be me that he laid eyes on. 

        Now your gonna ask why, right?

     Ryder Martinez is your typical high school bad boy. He has the whole package. He smokes, he's hot and has an eight pack, he's got the signature leather jacket, and he's gotta be the biggest player I've ever seen. He's either flirting with girls or trying to get into their pants. He's even rumored to be in jail a couple of times. Oh ya did I mention, his mom's the principal of the school. 

       Now on the other hand there's me. I'm your typical smart girl with the attitude. I love soccer and  I have the perfect family. I have trust issuers cause some people chose to do stuff and I pay the price. I don't know who to trust. 

      My names Mikayla Rivera but my friends and family call me Miko. 

      So please join me on the crazy ride of my life.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Siding With Plato
description:
Brooke Aarons can't get to college fast enough. Leaving behind her small town life, she intends to transform herself into a brilliant psychologist with no distractions along the way. But when she finds herself on a double date with the school's star football player - and worse, enjoying it - Brooke has to wonder if she's the one who needs her head examined. James Cartwright's easy life, endless bucks, and long line of willing girls should make him a non-starter for Brooke, but as she learns, the psychology behind a bad crush is a whole lot messier of a subject. Maybe Plato right. Maybe love is a serious mental disease. If so, Brooke doesn't have long to find a cure before James' attention proves to be a terminal condition.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Eh em… I was born April 24, 1987 and raised in Valencia, California, which has forever forced me to follow up that statement with, “yes, that’s where Six Flag Magic Mountain is,” and “no, I don’t have a season pass.” I finally broke free after 18 years of boring suburban life and found myself on a real rollercoaster, called Arizona State University. After 4 (fine…5) years of majoring in journalism and having the time of my life with incomparable friends (who helped inspire Siding with Plato) I grew up, graduated, and entered the working world . . . as an unpaid intern.

From New York to LA, I experienced life in public relations, marketing, social media, and finally landed an amazing job as a writer and red carpet reporter at an entertainment news publication. One minute I’m doing coffee runs and cold calling people just so they could hang up on me, the next I’m conversing with Hollywood’s A-listers.

Jumping into the chaotic world fit my personality to a T, since I tend to live a little impulsively – explaining the one bright green wall in my apartment and the fact that I am a dog owner now- but writing a novel was the biggest test I’ve ever given myself. There is no such thing as instant gratification in this process and as much as I wear my heart on my sleeve it still feels like letting someone read your diary- even if it’s a fictional diary. Without my amazingly supportive family and friends, I wouldn’t have the bravery to pursue this career path, but I truly hope you enjoy my corky little chic-lit.

This bio is a bore, but I promise you Siding With Plato isn’t! Happy Reading!

title: A New York Love
description:
Ellie-may Black moves to New York at the age of 21 to become a successful career woman and ends up working as the secretary of the infamous CEO of Westwood and Group Incorporated. Four years later, late night work and an over-observant CEO, Ellie is thrown into love and is forced to face her past. But will she be able to move on? And will she trust the playboy millionaire?

Nathan Westwood, playboy millionaire and infamous CEO of Westwood and Group Incorporated. Nate hired Ellie four years ago, but he notices that at the exact same time each year she always asks for two weeks leave. He always thought that it was to visit family, but on the fourth year the dates get mixed up so Ellie has to work. Leaving work late, Nate stumbles upon his secretary broke down in tears. Will he be able to break down the walls she's built? Or will he just end up pushing her away?

title: For the Love of 'Old Money'
description:
**********************************

"Um...it's from 'Branded', a burger place on Broome Street. They mostly sell burgers and fries," I say, like some redundant nitwit. Because what else would a burger place sell, Emmy? Duh!

"Riiight," he drawls, adding to my embarrassment. "So, Emeline..."

"You can call me Emmy," I interrupt. (Great, now he thinks you're dumb and rude)

"I like the sound of Emmy better anyway," Mr. Branault says. "Emeline makes you sound like a character  from 'little house on the prairie'."

I should probably be insulted by his observation, but instead, am compelled to laugh because I couldn't agree more. Emeline is totally a 'little house on the prairie' name. I'm just disappointed that I didn't think of it first.  

*********************************************

'Old money'(n.) - of, being, or related to people whose families have been rich for a long time

'Straight up broke'(n.) - of, being so poor that you contemplate stealing dollar bills out of a street performer's guitar case

Mr. Charles Branault is 'old money'.

Emeline Adkins is 'straight up broke'.

Hold onto your hats kiddos, cause this office romance is going to be a bumpy ride.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Lover of books, and probably the least romantic romance writer. Those who can't do, teach. Those who can't romance, write about it.

title: Untangled By Red
description:
"I didn't know what I was feeling, all I knew was I felt."

title: Always You
description:
She was an enigma. Her skin was bronzed to perfection, a constellation of freckles that grouped together closely on her nose slowly seeped out onto her cheeks. Messy chocolate locks that seemed to wave and curl at the oddest angles. Feline eyes that drew anyone in. My interest in her never seemed to fade through the years. 

I loved her to pieces and it would always remain that way.

Marcellus Jones has had a crush on the same girl since his sophomore year of high school, now in his sophomore year of college, he still views her as the most beautiful woman in the world, although she has no idea who he is. That changes one night after Reese and her fling call it quits and she meets the tattooed football player with neatly laid plaits on his scalp. She was immediately drawn to him as he is her. The two navigate being college athletes and their budding romance as well as their pasts catching up with them. 

This is a story of friendship, love, and overcoming the horror of the past.

Mike Burbank, fresh out of college, believes that a cheery smile and bottomless drawer of fun socks is enough to keep him going at his new career at Infinitech. While all his friends find the work soul-sucking, Mike refuses to let his neighborhood faceless tech company bring him down.

When a senior executive tears down Mike's seemingly perfect sales proposal, Mike is forced to relive his humiliation over and over again in a time loop. Will he win over upper management before his sanity crumbles? Is there a limit to how many times one can hear "TGIF" before one's sanity snaps? Only time will tell...

He was a son of God-a phrase which, if it means anything, means just that-and he must be about His Father's business, the service of a vast, vulgar, and meretricious beauty. title: Aishwarya ~ The Prince's Brown Bride
description:
Marriage had always been my dream but not to a man about whom I know nothing.

The moment my father fixed an alliance of me to a Prince without even telling or asking me, all the dreams I thought of a beautiful escape from reality, called marriage shattered into the pieces.

Never in my thoughts, had I imagined that I would get married to a complete stranger of whom I only knew the name. Prince Ranvijay Dev Singh.

I could see all my dreams shattering while chanting the prayers with him for our marriage. But, as soon as I took the step into his territory, my whole perspective towards a man changed.

Never in my thoughts, had I imagined that I would marry such kind of man. He was beautiful, and handsome, someone a woman would desire her whole life and still would not get. And, in front of him, I was nothing.

With my dark complexion, different upbringing, illiteracy and everything a princess should not be, I felt afraid even to my bones about what would he think after seeing me.

I did not even deserve him.

And, the mere thought of such a handsome and beautiful man finding the ugliness of his wife was twisting my stomach in thousands of ways.

***
Princesses should be beautiful, smart, intelligent, well-educated and up to the mark in all aspects of life. In the era of the 17th century when all the Princes were in search of the most beautiful brides. Prince Ranvijay Dev Singh got married to Aishwarya through a political arrangement. And, after seeing her wife after the wedding, he became the reason for the turning of her world upside down.

Let's dive to enjoy the journey of a politically arranged marriage.

@Copyright2023
Tous Droits Réservés
