title: His Solace , Her Devotion
description:
Dedication : To all the girls out there who're looking for a men who loves in the day and fucks at the night with the same passion....

Divya...., A girl who is like a butterfly.
Free spirited, indipendent,lovely and pretty butterfly with her beautiful wings splattered with all the beautiful colours of her dreams and emotions.
A lovely bubbly girl with the motive to live her life to the fullest.
She doesn't want any regrets in life.
Life isn't about going to lively happy places,meeting smiling people,living peacefully.
Life is about exploring everything ,every emotion ,every feeling ,every place.
Anger, love, empathy, sadness, happiness, just everything.
Apnon ko duniya bana lena zindagi nahi hai.
Duniya ko apna bana lena zindagi hai.
And just like a butterfly she's delegate.
She cannot tolerate violence
For her, violence is not an answer, it's a question.
And the answer is NO.

Reyansh...., A man of his words,always gets what he wants.
Violence is his first language.
Talking is his second.
His anger is so intense.

What happens when he meets our free spirited butterfly 🦋 Divya.
And fell in love?
With love comes attachments , obsession , posession , responsibility , respect.
Will love change him?
Or he will bind her freedom?
Cuff her?bind her?tie her?break her?
Will he change with time?

You know why bonds break...??
Because as you spend time with them.
It was beautiful at first.but as time passes.
They starts to annoy you , dehydrate you , suffocate you , Suffocate you to the point you wanna break free from them.
They feels like the cuffs that binds your freedom.
That binds you.
They feels like the walls of the prison that makes you feel nothing but imprisonment.
And then in the end you try to break free from them.
But when you can't.
And when they just won't let you go.
When they enjoy your bird cage and love seeing you flapping and fluttering in the cage. 
You just suffocate with them.
And get stuck in the cage of love.
Come along the journey to find out.👀

title: Embracing The Unexpected
description:
Iti Sehgal × Shiv Pratap Singh Rathod


"Iti,aapne sindoor kyu nhi lagaya h?shadi shuda h ab aap,yeh toh suhaag ki nishani hoti h,bina sindoor lagaye sabke saamne jayengi toh log baatein karenge"She said as she saw that Iti hadn't applied vermilion in her hair partition.

"Maaf kr dijiye....hum...hum bhul gaye the"Iti said getting scared that she would get scolded now.

"Yaad rakhna seekh lijiye kyuki log baatein krna nhi bhulenge"Nanisa Hukum said and Iti nodded.

"Hum abhi lagakr aate h sindoor"Iti said but Padmini Devi stopped her and instead asked a househelp to get the kumkum from the mandir of the palace.

Shiv stared at Iti,her eyes staring right at him before she looked away not being able to stare into his intense gaze.
______________________________________

"Hum thik h"Iti said softly her voice barely audible if he wasn't paying all of his attention to her.

"Hamari taraf dekhiye jab aap humse baat kr rahi ho"Shiv said in a not so gentle voice,he wasn't used to people not giving him attention!

Iti immediately stared at his face out of fear.This was the first time he had spoken to her in that tone.

He had always been gentle and soft spoken what happened to him?

"Hamari taraf dekhiyega agli baar se jab aap hame kuch keh rahi ho,ya hum aapse kuch keh rahe ho"Shiv simply stated and she nodded her head at that.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Rival Roommates
description:
When Valentina Alvarez has no choice but to move to a boarding school, her luck seems to run out. Being placed in the last room available means having to share with the schools notorious jock and player, Jordan Evans. They claim to despise each other, but under all the pride and dignity, they desire each other just as much. Is Valentina truly unlucky, or was being introduced to Jordan a godsend?

-

"Yes, I am the boyfriend of your beautiful daughter." He grins down at me, one arm snaking around my waist as he pulls me close against his chest. What is going on in this dumbass's brain? Is he crazy, trying to play along and fool my own mother. He must be out of his mind. 

Maybe I am too for going along with this.

"Isn't he wonderful mama?" I smile and reach up on my tiptoes, planting a kiss on his cheek. The hand around my waist stills for a moment, clearly surprised by my action, before it grips tighter, hugging me close. 

Any tighter and I'll lose blood circulation.

My mother's eyes dart warily between the two of us before she sighs and slumps her shoulders in defeat. "Wow, you've really moved on from Juan, haven't you?"

Relief floods from my shoulders when I realise she bought it. My mother. Actually believed that Jordan freaking Evans was my boyfriend. As if I would ever want to purposely go anywhere  remotely near that creature for free.

The moment my mother turned to look around my dorm room I felt the heat of him against my neck and my heart almost immediately started pumping a hundred beats a second. 

Damn you hormones. 

I needed to get laid. Soon. His warm breath fanned against my ear, his muscled arms still around my waist, and he whispered against my skin, "Either you're an amazing actor, or I think you've got a thing for me."

title: DESIRE TO CONTROL HER ✅
description:
He was the strictest Dom, loves to control women and she was a free bird, didn't like to be controlled by anybody. 

He was into the BDSM and she hates it. 

He was finding a challenging submissive for himself and she was a perfect match for him but she wasn't ready to accept his offer because she lived her life without any rules and regulations. She wanted to fly high like a free bird without any limitations. He has a burning desire to control her because she was his perfect choice but she was a hard nut to crack. He was crazy to make her his submissive and control her mind, soul and body. 


What will be the spark between them? Will it end with Dom dropping the whip or the bird getting into the cage?

To know these answers join the cute and intense journey of the hot and strictest Master and his cute little butterfly.


***

"I flared up by looking at the person like you." 

"What do you mean by this?" 

"I mean you're a Dominant who controls people life and I hate it." 

"You don't know anything, butterfly. At least experience it, then hate it." 


"It will be better if I throw you out of the cafe by kicking your ass." His eyes widened a bit in shock. "This will also be a new experience for me." I grinned. 

"Butterfly, you will regret if you ever do this to me or even say this to me again." His tone became stern suddenly.

"Oh, I'm so scared." I scoffed. 

"Fuck you and get the hell out of my cafe if you don't want me to kick your ass."

He frowned and dragged me to the backside of the cafe by seizing my wrist.

Then he pushed me into the party hall and hurriedly locked the door. 

"What the fuck do you think of yourself? You," 

"Shut up." He roared, cutting my words.

He again grasped my wrist and dragged me to the sofa. He sat down and with a swift motion, he yanked me down and bent me over his lap. He pinned me against the sofa by pressing his hand on my back and locked my legs between his legs.

What he is doing? Fear rushed down my spine.

authorBio:
An Aussie girl who loves to spend her free time reading or writing. I tackle a full time job along with my passion for writing. It's hard but it's worth it.

I may not always be active, it's hard with a full time job but I attempt to let my readers know that I appreciate your support. Yes I read every comment, even though I may not necessarily respond to all. Sometimes I don't know what to say, or perhaps I cannot come up with something witty. I want to thank everyone who has been by my side.

I've always loved reading, since I was a kid. I had two wishes growing up...I'd either want to be a singer or a writer. Sharing a part of my passion with you guys has meant the world to me. I do hope that one day my books are published and that I can hold a physical copy in my hand. Then perhaps I would know that I've made it, I've done what I set out to do.

You guys are that one step in the right direction to my dreams and for that I am forever thankful.

title: Mr. Billionaire's Lovely Wife.
description:
"Treat me like your wife. I want you to give me a chance, give this marriage a chance."

He looks at me with those brilliant blue eyes of his. His eyes pierce through my soul and I wish I hadn't said anything.

He takes a step towards me and I step back only to find myself sandwiched between him and the wall. I look up at him and our eyes meet.

"You want me to give this marriage a chance?" He asks in a surprisingly soft tone. 

I nod. Yes. I want this more than anything in this world.

He cages me between his strong arms and brings his face closer to mine.

"Are you sure you can handle it, Marilyn?" He asks, I close my eyes because I'm scared now. I don't know what he's goin-

My mind goes completely blank when I feel his lips on mine. 

Oh my god.

******
Marilyn's life completely changes when she gets married to the hot CEO of Hayes and Co. the one and only, Aiden Hayes. Her hopes to have a great married life come crashing down on her wedding night when she realizes that her husband has no intentions to give this marriage a fair chance. To him, his work is everything. But, Marilyn couldn't give up, just not yet. She has to make this marriage work. 
Will she be able to succeed?
Or will she end up losing him forever?

When a mysterious stalker shows up and things take a dangerous turn, Killian's help might be exactly what she needs.

title: The CEO's Contract Wife ✓
description:
𝐒𝐚𝐟𝐢𝐚 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐮𝐟 was a simple girl with simple dreams living in a village , but after she shifts Delhi for her studies and to find 2 certain people who was related with her best friend , she finds things getting difficult for her . Not only does she find it difficult to find those 2 people in the busy bustling city , but also suffers to meet her daily expenses and the cost of her father's medical bills . 

That's when she thought she finally received a simple help from God, but was it really a help ? or a deal ? or to put things in order - A contract to marry the Fawad Siddique and be the surrogate mother of his child . 

𝐅𝐚𝐰𝐚𝐝 𝐒𝐢𝐝𝐝𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐞 is not only a very influential businessman but also a part of the dark world . He kills for deals , kills for money and kills for fun . Killing people was never a big deal for him . But he is just a pawn of his father , when his father wanted him to ace in exams-he did ,  handle the dirty work-he did . Now his father wanted an heir and he must do that too . 

But love isn't something on his list , so he decides to go into a contract marriage . Money in exchange for a child-Great deal right ? But what isn't so great is the unwelcomed feelings of love which won't be very good for any of them . 

Especially not when 𝐌𝐫𝐬 𝐙 is on watch . No name , no clues , no information is available about her , except the fact that she wants to end Fawad at all costs . She is a nightmare you can't wake up from . 

How will the unexpected love take place in all this situation at her watch ? Read  𝑪.𝑬.𝑶'𝒔 𝑪𝒐𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒂𝒄𝒕 𝑾𝒊𝒇𝒆 to find out ♡

[3 SIDE COUPLES IN THE STORY]

title: Damon's Cage
description:
"I don't know. Please let me go,...please..." She pleaded with her eyes half open while her lip shivered giving into the freezing night of Alaska. She whimpered feeling a hand at her chin yanking her face up. Her whole body was sore giving into the torture she had been through. 
"Beautiful,..." Someone breathed into her ear and she knew who this voice belong to. "...who tied her up?" Demon demanded from the man standing behind him now.
Nancy broke into the sobs looking up. "Please, I really don't know anything about Ken...he..." Her voice gave up when he rubbed his thumb on her mouth.
"I trust you sweetie. But it seems he has left something for us to collect."
Dark Romance

title: Ardaas- For A Family
description:
‶Get out of my sight before I do something I'll regret!″ the eldest shouted, his voice laced with fury.

‶I will. But I'm taking her with me,″ his younger brother replied, his expression unwavering.

‶Don't you dare come near her! She won't end up like you!″ the eldest retorted, his eyes ablaze with anger. 

Amidst their yelling match, a young girl sat under the table, her eyes overflowing with tears and head throbbing uncontrollably. Her family had always been an unconventional one, but that day marked its transition from unconventional to unhappy.

*************************

Miles apart, a young boy looked at the star marred sky with twinkling eyes. As the shooting star made its appearance, he closed his eyes and prayed for the one thing he craved for the most.

'A happy family.'

‶What did you wish for?″ a manly voice interrupted him.

‶Death.″

title: Forbidden Flames: My Stepbrother
description:
Forbidden Flames: Spicy Series

Book 2 My Stepbrother 

Stella
I was a broken soul, and I never thought that I would be healed by my stepbrother.

Alex
My stepsister, whom I thought would hate her, but she became the one and only person whom I desire deeply.

***

"No. Flower, you're not ugly. If you could see yourself through my eyes, you'd understand how beautiful and desirable you are." I hold her face in my hands again, pulling her closer.

"You're lying, Alex. You treated me horribly at first because you thought I was ugly too."

She's not ready to hear my words, lost in the pain caused by that asshole boyfriend of hers. I press my lips against hers again, wrapping my arms around her waist, pushing her against the car. Her hand rests on the car's bumper.

I'm going to kiss her until she understands I'm not lying, that she is beautiful and desirable in every way.

title: Crush To Boss. ✓ [MAJOR EDIT]
description:
"Take it."

He mumbled. I obeyed him.

His lips were at one end while mine at the other.

I felt the heat surround us.

He slowly bit the stick leaning closer.

I panicked a little.

"Hurry."

He mumbled. I obeyed once again, slowly biting it. 

And then it was a centimetre gap between us.

My breathe hitched.

I placed my palm against his shoulder hoping he would pull away.

But he didn't, instead he wrapped his hands slowly around my waist.

title: We Begin At The End
description:
Everyone knew it - the high-society elite, the tabloids, even the most obscure celebrity in Rome - that Luca De Santis, the dashing CEO of De Santis Investment Bank, hadn't married for love. Not her, not Amber, the penniless American intern who'd made the grave mistake of falling into his bed and getting pregnant with his child. It was whispered in the grand halls of Italian society, echoed by his ruthless mother, who never failed to remind Amber of her "fortunate accident" that had thrust her into this world of opulence.
From the day they wed, Luca's family loathed her. She was the outsider, the scandalous mistress who had torn him away from the beautiful and adored Carlotta Fiorentino, the heiress who everyone believed was destined to be Mrs. De Santis. 
 But the final blow was watching him retreat entirely - not just from her, but from their son, Nico. So, Amber did the only thing she could. She left. Packed her bags, took Nico, and fled back to the States. Luca barely batted an eye. And within weeks, he was back with Carlotta, the woman everyone believed he should have been with all along.
Now, four years later, Rome buzzed again with wedding excitement. Luca was set to marry Carlotta, and this time, it was going to be a royal affair - a spectacle that would unite two of Italy's most powerful families. The wedding of the century, everyone called it.
But Amber was back. With their son. In Rome.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Shy Girl Has a Gun
description:
Faith Mitchell was never confident. She was happy to blend into the background, much to the protest of her friends. At 16, her life was a normal teenage cliche. She was in love with Jace, the obnoxious player who she couldn't have, and her biggest worry was whether or not he would finally come to his senses and see that she really was the one for him. 
  
  That is until she is kidnapped and recruited by a secret agency of assassins. She is torn away from her normal teenage life and thrown into a world of guns, knifes and criminals. The agency mold her into the perfect killing machine, and at 19 she is no longer the shy girl that was snatched away from her uncomplicated life, but a ruthless killer who will stop at nothing to complete whatever mission she is on.
  
  Then, the agency has a new mission which involves Faith returning to her hometown, and facing her friends, family and the very boy who broke her heart just before it turned into stone. 
  
  What will happen once Faith comes face to face with Jace? 
  
  Will the obnoxious player be able to reach out and get the old Faith back without pressing any of her wrong buttons, considering that the shy girl he once knew now has a gun.
  
  (WATTY AWARDS 2011)
 (THE FICTION AWARDS 2017)

title: The Royal Stranger
description:
Vrishali was popularly known as the life of the party. She had a natural ability to make friends with anyone she met. Everyone adored her, and she had yet to find her perfect match amidst all the chaos of her college parties. However, she was not interested in dating anyone at the moment. She was content with being single and wanted to enjoy her college life to the fullest without any commitments holding her back.

She always had this belief in the timeline in her mind. 'Meeting. . . Knowing. . . Dating. . . Live-in. . . Marriage. . .' Marriage has always been somewhere in the back of her head. She didn't believe in the concept of love at first sight or the prospect of marrying someone she hadn't lived with. 

She is fully committed to enjoying her college life to the fullest. However, when her grandparents invite her parents to spend the summer holidays with them in India, she reluctantly agrees to go along. To her delight, she discovers that she will have the opportunity to meet one of the country's royal families during her trip.

But that's not all stored for her. When things take a 360°, she couldn't do anything except listen. 

Until it crashed all her beliefs in one go, they said love doesn't need to come first, then marriage. It can be the other way: first comes marriage, then comes love, filling you like slow happiness in a desert of sadness. 

"We meet for a reason― to fill the empty parts, to make it a little over the top, to try the filmy drama in a drama called life."

✿⁠ ✿ ✿⁠ ✿ ✿⁠ ✿ ✿⁠ ✿ ✿⁠ ✿


I am asking you for the last time will you marry me willingly or not."

" And I am answering you for the last time. I will never ever marry you. Not even if you are the last person in the whole world."

" Ok fine then I will marry you ."

The moment he saw her he decided that she was his. 
The moment the devil entered into her world she was his.

The devil himself carved it with blood that she was the devil's soulmate even though the destiny was against it.

She was the devil's soulmate.

title: The player and the shy girl (english version)
description:
As I walk into the school, he spots me and immediately starts talking to me. I brush past him, ignoring him, but today is definitely not my lucky day...

He grabs my arm firmly, stopping me, and turns me to face him. The pain on my face contorts his expression.

"What's wrong, Emma? Lost your voice, lizard?"

I don't look at him; my head is hung low once again.

"When I'm talking, you need to look at me!" he shouts, lifting my chin so I have to meet his gaze.

I look at him, but it's not with innocence; it's with anger.

"Oh, look, Emma's angry, everyone!" he mocks.

"Just leave me alone," I say, meeting his eyes as I pull my arm free from his grip and walk away.

He stares at me, shocked, as do all the kids around us, not expecting what I just did.

title: Eventually Yours
description:
A younger sister cannot wed before an older sister.

It's a law of their society, a rule vehemently obeyed by prominent families in the nobility, and it's always been Ella Harrington's buffer. 

Ella has never been interested in marrying for anything short of love itself. Unfortunately for her, love is a rarity in the marriages of the aristocracy. Fortunately for her, her sister Emily is precisely one year older than her and is the most unpleasant, disagreeable, sulking woman to ever debut in all of England. So Ella may never have to marry at all.

A free woman, she enjoys her time on the sidelines and wishes for nothing more. That is, until a tall, dark, and brooding Duke comes to town alongside an old friend of her brother's. Suddenly, Ella finds herself questioning the antiquated marriage order rule as her buffer begins to feel more like a barrier. Not that it matters. The Duke isn't interested in her anyway.

Right?

title: The King's Revenge
description:
I woke up because I felt something on my throat making it hard for me to breath, I look up to see Leonardo is looking down at me while smirking, his both hands were wrapped around my throat 

" you thought I like you don't you?" He asked I fought hard to remove his hand, but I couldn't. I felt tears streaming down my cheeks like burning fire as I saw black circles dancing across my vision almost taking over 

" then know this, I hate you and I never loved you. I just wanted to be with you so I can break you. Someone like you doesn't deserve happiness" let go of me feeling like my death is getting closer. the ache my heart was feeling now  is worst than everything I ever felt.

" L-Leo - p-please " I whispered fighting harder against his grip 

" bye-bye, love," he said and everything went dark

"Thank God, you took my call," he mumbled. 

"Why did you send that flower bouquet?" He fought the urge to chuckle at her troubled voice. 

"At least those flowers made you talk to me. May I know what I did to get this ignored treatment of you?"

"Don't do such things and please don't call me again."

She wanted to say this but her tongue refused to form those words.

"I...I was just busy due to my studies that's why." She bit her tongue when she realized she had answered exactly the opposite of what she wanted to say. 

He sat up and glared at the phone's screen. 

So this kitten knew how to play hard to get?

"Are you sure that's the only reason?"

"No, I am telling the truth. I have exams in a few days. "

"Ohh...so am I distracting you?" 

"I am sorry, I won't disturb you now."

"No, no, you don't disturb me." Her heart came into her mouth at the consequences of his words.


It was not easy to resist Ruhaan Sufiyan Ahmad. He himself knew it and it took Nisha Sikandar just two weeks to realize it. 

             ____________________

title: The Billionaire's Sweet Wife
description:
Zoe is a kind and simple woman who works as an assistant for Dante, a cold and powerful CEO who has a five-year-old daughter named Chloe. Dante needs a wife to improve his image and his daughter's happiness, so he makes Zoe a shocking offer: he wants her to be his contracted wife for a year, in exchange for a large sum of money. Zoe accepts, out of desperation and compassion, and marries Dante at the civil bureau. Their marriage is a secret, and they live together in his mansion with Chloe. Zoe tries to be a good wife and mother, but Dante remains aloof and distant. He treats her like a stranger, and sometimes even a nuisance. Zoe is hurt by his attitude, but she doesn't give up. She loves Chloe, and she hopes to win Dante's heart someday. She believes that there is more to him than his cold exterior, and that he has a reason for his behavior.

As time passes, Zoe and Dante face various challenges and obstacles that test their relationship. They encounter jealousy, misunderstandings, danger, and secrets. They also discover new feelings and emotions that they never expected. They realize that they have more in common than they thought, and that they need each other more than they admit.

Will Zoe and Dante overcome their differences and find true love? Will Chloe get the happy family that she deserves? Will Dante learn to trust and care for Zoe and Chloe? Find out in this romantic and dramatic story of a contracted marriage that turns into a real one.

title: LET ME HATE YOU
description:
Ever wonder how your supposed best day of life will turn into a lifelong nightmare. Two people, two different worlds yet bound by the same emotion, "HATE" and "same loved ones". Marriage is intended to be an eternal bond filled with love and happiness. This was far from the truth for Asmaira and Amaan. Two broken souls entangle in the game of destiny which ended their dream of everlasting love.
For one, it was a journey of regret which she has to live for the rest of her life. But why?.
For other, he was forced yet he promised to seek revenge for sure., for seeking "Her" place. Who is Amaan referring to as "Her"?
Who is this "loved ones" that connects both Asmara and Amaan and why do they hate each other so much without even meeting each other?
"Please......." the only word that she could manage to say while trying to get out of his grip and sobbing.
"Please......Let..........Me..........Go, " she stammered in between her hiccup, shaking her head with pleading eyes and folded hands.
"Don't be afraid honey! I realized my mistake of not accepting you as my wife and to mark the start of our marriage how about I gift you something, " He whispered while leaning close to her ear emphasizing on the word 'gift'.
Sensing her fright, he placed his hand on her waist while using the other to stroke her cheek, "how about giving you a baby tonight?". He spoke with an evil smirk. 
" I know it is your first time and I promise to be gentle with you, My Wife"

title: CHASING ARIEON
description:
"Don't touch me!", Arieon yelled at him as tears fell freely from her eyes. She was breathing heavily from the way she ran down the stairs.

"You'll harm yourself, be careful!", Enzo snapped at her angrily. She glared at him, "The only harm that will come to me is you, so stay the fuck away!". He rolled his eyes and walked down the stairs.

The more steps he took towards her,the more she moved backwards. Her back hit the wall and she cursed internally. He grinned in triumph and placed his fingers on her jaw making her to look at him.

"Mi cara, you're the only good in my life. You and our unborn child", he placed his hand on her stomach and she felt her heart flutter. "Stop running away", he leaned closer to her. "And if I don't", she asked in a hushed tone. 

Their eyes locked and he grinned, "I'll keep chasing you, Arieon".

title: In love with my husband
description:
"Is she your wife?" she asked hesitantly. 

"Yes", Avishek said no more. 

Is he not going to introduce me? 

I should leave. It's clear, they wanted to be alone, to talk about whatever the hell they wanted to talk. 
I managed a smile and said, "I'll wait in the car", and left before anyone said anything. 

I walked out of the café, walked to the car, opened the door and flopped into the passenger seat. She's back. The love of his life, she's back. Whenever my mind wandered about Avishek's past, I had always pictured that girl as this beautiful woman who turned heads when she walked into the room. I was right. Ruchika was beautiful. Even with dark circles under her eyes, messy hair that looked like she hadn't washed it for days, her tired smile, she was still beautiful. I could only imagine how she was when they were young. 

Why now though? 

After all these years?

title: Sinner and Saint
description:
Kady Lynn Jones is an acquired taste. 

From her exotic beauty to her brash personality, she's notorious for being too hot to handle. 
Her history with men has convinced her to never have a future with any one of them--a promise that's been too easy to keep until him.

Stellan Cartwright is a modern day prince charming.

From his renowned genius as a tech entrepreneur to his reputation as a perfect gentleman, he's the most eligible bachelor in the country.

His close call to making the mistake of a lifetime has taught him to never settle again--a resolve that comes down to simply waiting for her.

They are each other's secret, each other's scar.

Fighting a pull that will not let go--may it be against time, tragedy or toxic fears--they land on a rare chance to decide if what was once impossible could become the inevitable.

It might be heaven or hell but unable to remain in the restless, endless in-between, they will dare to find out if a sinner and saint can truly live happily ever after.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I've been writing for as long as I can remember. It started when I started writing alternate endings for the Sweet Valley books I read as a kid when I didn't like how they ended.  I remember writing with pencil on spiral notebooks during class in high school for years. It was painful but it was the only way to keep writing without the teacher knowing. I wouldn't recommend it to anyone but that was how obsessed I was. Those books passed hands within our class, then our school and then around different schools until people started to randomly message me and ask for the next part. Wattpad is like the grown-up and much more convenient version of that experience. LOL!

Anyway, as for what I write, I've finally come out after all these years and I can say with pride that I write romance. There's nothing more fun for me to write about love and all its quirks and complications.

That's what you'll find in my Works and on my reading lists.

If you'd like to follow me along for updates and other random thoughts, find me on Instagram @ninyatippettwrites.

You can also check out my Skillshare class if you ever need some input on writing: skl.sh/ninya

Happy reading!

title: Bitterly Sweetly (Completed)
description:
~ Past separated them, now pain will bring them together.~

A teenager Sofia Hayden, experiencing her falling apart family isolated herself slowly from everything that she held dear, especially from her best friend Max Wilder who had just realized his love for her. It delivered Max the kind of grief that changed him radically. Misunderstanding turned his love into hatred.

Max left with a broken heart and the ever burning hunger to give her back the same kind of pain she'd inflicted upon him. And he succeeded, coming back ten years later.

Pity that he was still oblivious to many things. Silly that she still blamed herself. 

Then fate in the form of an old cupid named Robert Wilder and a humongous debt intervened. And a marriage made in hell was got in result.

~A journey of pain and revenge, hastily made wrong decisions and consequences will take them both somewhere, where they are meant to be.~
~This is their bitter sweet tale of letting go; growing up and maybe along the way falling inevitably in love.~

title: The Sunshine Of My Life ✓
description:
•UNDER EDITING•

Abhimanyu Chowdhary-A mysterious 28 years old man. CEO of Chowdary group of companies. He has looks that every girl craves and go crazy. Rude, arrogant, cold-hearted man and a man of fewer words. He is broken right from his birth which made him like a king of darkness.  

Sitaara Dev Shetty- A  24 years old beauty with a brain. She has a beautiful smile that can make others feel serene just by looking at her smiling face. An epitome of beauty full of innocence and bubbliness. She has a past no one knew except her best friends and her brother.

He is a miserable soul,
She came as light into his dark world and became his reason to live.

She is a shattered soul,
He came into her life to mend her broken pieces.

She became his drug for all his panic, anxiety and anger whilst he became her medicine to survive.

They both came into each other's life's unexpectedly and everything turned into the best. They both became remedies to each other's pain. Without knowing to themselves they made a special place in each other's hearts. Their love for each other roared louder than their demons. They were a thunderstorm that brought sunshine into each other's lives. 

When you can't look on the bright side I will sit with you in dark and show you the brightest side - Sitaara

And you are the moon, most beautiful in my darkness - Abhimanyu.

So, guys let's peek into their story of mending each other's hearts, completing each other's happiness and becoming each other's home. It's a twisted story with betrayal, dark secrets, painful past.

authorBio:
INDIAN

I love creating characters and making an imaginary world where I find my peace. 

Amateur writer! I have written a few novels which are yet to publish and am gonna bring them out soon.

The male protagonists in my stories aren't always heroic, strong, emotionless but possess all the qualities just like us. They lose, they fight, they cry, they fail, but in the end, they come back stronger.

The female protagonists in my stories aren't always the weak ones who bear shit thrown at them, put their self-respect at stake to feed others evilness but possesses all the qualities a 'woman' has to. To stand for herself, to fight for herself, to go through the right path without hurting anyone.

The characters in my stories are maybe in a huge number because I want to depict things like relations, morals, love and loyalty, which people nowadays lack a lot, sadly.

Do not try to copy my works. IT'S A REQUEST! Stories with my imagination make me feel at peace and I don't want someone to wreck it, mercilessly.

If any plot or contents match with other stories you people have read, do not run to criticize me because I don't need to copy others work when am blessed with the over-imagining brain. Whatever the stories I am publishing are made of my thoughts and things that crossed my path in real life. I have every proof that the stories am publishing are MINE, ONLY MINE. So, don't copy or accuse me of plagiarism. I won't bear hurtful things showered at me.

I do accept the reading request but not sure if I can read them immediately.

My dad used to say two things when I was little: "Men are all the same" and "Don't fall in love with an athlete". I believed both, until he rushed into my life. I should save us both the trouble and stay far away from him. But rules were made to be broken, and I was never good at following them anyway.


Aidan Powell

I made it to the top. Now, I'm determined to be the best. No distractions. I eat, sleep, and breathe hockey. Until my birthday when my teammates convince me to live a little. title: Broken But Yours
description:
What happens when your feelings and thoughts don't agree? You feel like there's a battle happening inside you. Your heart tells you what you really want to hear, but your stubborn mind won't quiet down. This is exactly what happened to Chris Collins, the popular guy at his university and the future CEO of his company. He got hurt deeply before, and he'll do anything to avoid getting hurt again. Everyone wants to get close to him, but he's built high walls around his heart. His piercing blue eyes and harsh words hurt people, just like they did to Amber Milburn, a new student at the university, and his potential future... something or everything?

***

 "How could you do that to me? Why did you make me sign such a contract." I asked, furiously.

He looked up from his laptop and smirked looking at me.

"As far as I remember, I didn't make you sign the contract, did I? You signed it on your own If I am not wrong. It is entirely your fault if you signed it without reading the documents properly. The first rule in the business is, Never sign any papers without reading them properly." he said looking at me with his evil smirk.

"I deny to follow that contract." I said, challenging him. 

"Your wish, Ms. Milburn. You can walk out of the company any moment you want and meet my lawyers in the court tomorrow," he said, leaning back on his chair. 

"You're cruel, Chris." I said helplessly.

"It's Mr. Collins for you, Ms. Milburn. I hope you have learnt the basic etiquette and know what professionalism means or else your business degree is of no use." he said, sternly. 

"I hate you!" I said, furiously.

"Now if you are done wasting my time then go and bring me my cup of coffee. No sugar. Now out!" he said as he concentrated on his laptop.

I walked out of his company, helpless.

These three months are going to be the most disturbing and stressful three months of my life.

Read to find out more!

He tenido la oportunidad de escribir artículos comisionados para publicaciones como National Geographic y la marca H&M, tengo un audiolibro publicado con Hachette y Wattpad, y mi historia Príncipe con Beneficios ha sido publicada con dos editoriales en Filipinas y es ahora un Wattpad Original en español.
Soy una soñadora y romántica empedernida. Me gusta escribir historias mega cliché, dulces y emotivas que te conmoverán, te harán reír y llorar.
Mis lectoras han creído en mí, mucho más de lo que YO he creído en mí, y me han ayudado a continuar con mi sueño, y siempre tendrán mi agradecimiento.
*No contesto mensajes privados*

💕English:
In 2011, I published my first story on Wattpad, I never imagined that it would change my life. Since then I have written several novels, and some short narratives, and even one of my books, Prince with Benefits, has been published with Pop Fiction Books and ABS-CBN books in the Philippines and is now a Wattpad Original in Spanish.
I have had the opportunity to write commissioned articles for publications such as National Geographic and the H&M brand.
I am a dreamer and a true romantic. I like to write sweet and emotional stories that will move you, and make you laugh and cry.
My readers have believed in me and have helped me to continue with my dream.
I'm currently a Literary Agent at The Seymour Agency and I'm loving it!

title: Lost in Lust ✔️
description:
"With the hand that was around her waist, I pulled her towards me and put the other hand around her neck.

I kissed her passionately, as if my life depended on it. At first she was stiff and surprised but after I bit her lip, she let me in. She ran her fingers trough my hair and we fought for dominance, juicy and vigorously exploring each other.

We parted with heavy sighs and I leaned my forehead against hers. With our eyes closed and our lips silent, we talked about everything that kiss meant to us. She stroked my cheek  and her angelic touch made light shine through my cracks.

I took her hand and we plunged into the night blue.

"Let's get out of here."

------------------------------------
Immerse yourself in a world where you will discover two people crossing the path of lust, denial, fatal attraction and self evolution. Somewhere between love and lust, hope and broken hearts- what will happen when two strong personalities meet?

Kaylee Walker is a promising lawyer who lives by the words of the law. What will happen when she meets a billionaire, a respectable businessman who will reveal her deeply hidden secrets from which she ran away?
Noah Carter is the richest CEO according to Forbes, but what most people don't know is that he is the king of the underworld and a hardened mobster.

She never loses. He always wins.
Can she be yin to his yang?

authorBio:
"I have lived a thousand lives and I've loved a thousand loves. I've walked on distant worlds and seen the end of time. Because I read."

‚‚Lost in Lust‚‚ was my first story, my testing grounds. I was still finding myself.  As I wrote "Absolutely HIs," I began to free myself.
I am still on my way to letting the 'real me' sees the light of the day. To boldly express what I carry in my mind and heart.

And I think that with each new story you write, you become more experienced and with an accurate vision of what you want. I am still on that path. So travel with me!

title: My Accidental Marriage
description:
Description:

People say accidents happen for a reason. But what about accidents that turn your whole life upside down? What about accidents that change the whole meaning of your life? 

Meet Khushi Sharma, a girl who was lost in her own world. Struggling with issues that she didn't deserved but were burdened with all her life. It was her destiny. A destiny that she saw no future in except darkness.

Meet Manish Malhotra, a boy free from all binding of the world. Being broken from his past and filled with hatred, all he wanted was freedom from the boundations of life. Though he had all in his life still his life felt empty and filled with darkness.

But what will happen when 2 people whose worlds are filled with darkness collided in such a way that it leaves them with situations they both struggle to understand and handle. Will they be able to push apart each other's darkness and lighten up their world together or will fate push them into the largest hole of darkness they have yet to discover in their life. Read My Accidental Marriage to find out.

Updates Every Friday!

Reena was the daughter of the billionaire, the founder of Oberoi Cyber Security but the death of her parents shakens her mental health. No Psychtrist was able to treat her when her uncle and aunt decides to give Reena's case to Dr. Aadhya- one of the most renowned Psychtrist of India. She was known for solving the most complex cases. But Aadhya rejects Reena's case only to become her best friend later. When Aarnav Oberoi, the elder brother of Reena comes to know about Aadhya he thinks that she is planning on hurting his sister and had wrong intentions, he starts to hate her more than anything. Aadhya was full of life and treated people with love but also put people in place when someone tries to mess up with her. Aarnav was a ruthless devil who feared no one but the world feared him because he spared no one who tried to betray him. But the destiny had different plans; what will happen when things start getting spicy between the enemies? A girl who was left by her boyfriend 4 years ago and still not over him and a boy who never fell in love were already convinced that real love didn't exist and they did not believe in love,were falling for each other.But why did they always feel if they already know each other from very long time when they have never met each other before? It felt like they had a strong bond which they were unaware of. What will happen when they find out about the truth their families have been hiding for decades? Will they love each other the same or will they separate their ways?

title: Man and Wife (18+)
description:
"Do you know what they call you?" The sound of his voice bounced into my ears, finger sliding into me. 

"Powerful. That's what they call you" 

Damn him!

Those pumps of his, were slow, careful, and while each push of his finger was every bit sensual to my being, I swore not to fall into that calm gaze he bore. 

"Luca.." My voice wavered, fingers digging into his arm. 

"Isabella" Followed his voice, breath fanning onto my skin. 

The words which were to be emitted turned heavy on my tongue, for I was only left meeting that gaze of his.

"Do you want me to stop?" 

I managed a nod, pushing back the gasp hung in my throat all through the time those grey eyes begat my profile. 

He tugged my legs even higher, bringing it to rest on his arms, and in the second my body came flat on the wall, his fingers were sure to push in and outside my area. 

And at once he stopped. 

My perspired figure left onlooking his comported one, those eyes of his ensured lingering on my profile. 

"I'd rather it be the last time I catch my own wife sending  such sensation to the lot of other men" Followed his words. 

With that, he had pushed back on his feet, straightening his jacket, soon turning away from me. 

"I'll be waiting for you in the halls" Those were the words I heard right before he walked out, leaving me lingering in such perplexity which had gotten the most of my being. 

And while I struggled to find my own breath, I was left muddled on whoever this beast was whom I had gotten married to.


~~~
Strung on a chain of events, Isabella Campbell finds herself waddling through a rocky path, one which was to have her marred, or perhaps made. 

Joined in union to the son of an infamous Mafia conglomerate, she battles with adjusting to life with the Bonnuccis, and the dealings that comes with. 




CONTENT WARNING: This story is totally a work of fiction! It contains mature content, use of vulgar terms, and includes explicit narration of violence.

title: Broken yet Beautiful (Completed)
description:
'I hope for us.'

'This hope gives me strength to breath.' 

'Strength to fight with our odds.' 

'One day to win over our demons.'

'Hope for that one day is like wishing for rain as I stand in the desert.'

I raised my hand to catch rain drops falling on the glass window. Two arms encircled around my waist from back flinching me at my spot.

His touch.

He nuzzled his face in my hairs.

"Ohh thank god. You came back." His hot breath on my shoulder blade.

"Do you know how much I missed you?"

"You know I cannot live with out you. I need you. I need you." His lips on my neck, shudders passed down my spine.

"I knew you will be back to me."

"I love you."

He made me turn and kissed my forehead closing his eyes. Tears were flowing from his eye but his lips were enriched with small smile.

"I love you so much Meera" he mumbled against my skin.

"Myra" I had to break his reverie.

"Meera" He was still lost. 

"Neil, I am Myra." He studied my face.

He took step back keeping his eyes on my face, trying to find someone.

To be precise.... My sister.... My twin sister.

His teary eyes turned in to charcoal red in a moment when reality hit him hard.

"Get out" he looked everywhere but not at me.

"Neil"

"You don't have any right to enter in this room. GET OUT" He shouted on top of his voice.

Warm tears started streaming on my cheeks. 

"Dare you step in this room again."

I bowed my head and was stepping out. I was at door step when I heard his ear piercing scream. It pinched my heart.

Neil ran towards crib to pick his son in his arms. 

'I knew he needed me.'

Neil cooed Neev, but he was also stubborn like his father. He was crying, he was asking me to take him in my embrace by raising his hands looking at me. 

'My baby was telling me to stop. To hold him. To love him'

description:
(Sequel to Possessive At First Sight) 
Highest Romance Rating: #70

Alexander James Demakis. 
    One thing for sure, he's a drop-dead gorgeous hunk with a stare that could make you cum right away. At a young age, he earned a spot in Forbes as one of the world most influential person. He turns silver into gold. And, as far as women go, they just exist as a mere sexual plaything. 
    
    Meet his match, Clara Bell Valiente. 
    A strong-willed royal, calm but a very blunt model. And she hated Alexander with a passion. 
    
    A stolen kiss both made them realized that hate has a deeper meaning, but friendship comes first before love, that's Clara Bell's principle, except for Alex. 
    
    He doesn't believe in Best Friend Forever especially when he knew Clara's so called bestfriend more than anyone.
    
    He's going all the way breaking that friend zone just to get another kiss from the woman who made him realized that kisses can be addicting, and he's addicted to her, like a heroine. And nothing can stop a drug addict, not even her bestfriend which happens to be his ex.

title: Lean On Me #Wattys2016
description:
Mateo Sanchez is a wounded warrior. He's 22 years old and on the mend from the injuries he received in a battle that took his fellow Marine's life. He's angry and unsettled, trying to get back to the man he used to be. 

Ashlyn West has always been a rescuer. She works at the hospital helping wounded vets get stronger. She's seen the way an injury can annihilate the life of the men who have been brave enough to sacrifice for their country. She's a fighter...and a lover, but she hasn't met her toughest patient yet.

When Ashlyn gets assigned to Mateo's shift, the two of them are forced to spend time together everyday. Mateo quickly learns that his physical therapy isn't only going to be torture on his leg, watching her with bend and move is going to be torture on his libido. The two quickly find that his limb isn't the only thing needing mending. Will he fight leaning on her or will the two of them find a hotter way to build his physical endurance?

Lean On Me will be the third book in the Dear Bailey Series. It can be read as a stand-alone novel. If you like your stories hot and your leading male hotter....then this is the one for you.

title: Saving Who?
description:
She seeked solace in kneading dough and icing tiers of cakes, but Katherina Baker was given an ultimatum by her parents. Choose a career that they wanted her to pursue, or leave. Her grandmother stood by her side and guided her every step of the way. Until they received news about her brother and a certain green-eyed devil who had enlisted in the NAVY years before.

Talen Noah Parker wanted to break out of his spoiled life. So he enlists with the NAVY with his best friend. Heartbroken to be leaving the "love of his life" behind, he starts writing emails to her and falls even more in love with her. He just doesn't know it isn't who he thinks it is.... When an accident happens and he's forced to come back, will he find out the truth?

authorBio:
An Aussie girl who loves to spend her free time reading or writing. I tackle a full time job along with my passion for writing. It's hard but it's worth it.

I may not always be active, it's hard with a full time job but I attempt to let my readers know that I appreciate your support. Yes I read every comment, even though I may not necessarily respond to all. Sometimes I don't know what to say, or perhaps I cannot come up with something witty. I want to thank everyone who has been by my side.

I've always loved reading, since I was a kid. I had two wishes growing up...I'd either want to be a singer or a writer. Sharing a part of my passion with you guys has meant the world to me. I do hope that one day my books are published and that I can hold a physical copy in my hand. Then perhaps I would know that I've made it, I've done what I set out to do.

You guys are that one step in the right direction to my dreams and for that I am forever thankful.

title: UNWILLINGLY HIS
description:
**Her wedding day was supposed to be the start of forever. Instead, it became the day her world collapsed.**

Samaira had it all-until Advait, the man she trusted, shattered her dreams on their wedding day. Left standing at the altar, humiliated and heartbroken, she was forced to rebuild her life from the ashes of betrayal. Just when she thought she was finally moving on, her family pushes her into another marriage-this time to Aarav, a successful businessman, and the son of a powerful politician. Reluctantly, Samaira agrees-believing it will restore her family's tarnished reputation.

But fate, cruel and unforgiving, has different plans.

**Advait reappears, but not in the way she expects.** Not to apologize. Not to beg for forgiveness. No, this time, he forces her into his world. **He marries her-against her will.**

Why now? Why after everything they went through? Why after abandoning her, does he now claim her as his own? **What does he want?**

Samaira, no longer the naïve woman who once adored him, is determined to escape his ruthless grasp. She runs. She hides. But Advait's influence reaches far beyond anything she could've imagined. His power, his control-it's all-consuming. He won't let her go. **Not this time.**

As the walls close in and the battle for control intensifies, Samaira must confront a terrifying truth: **Will she be trapped in Advait's dangerous world forever? Or will she find the strength to break free, no matter the cost?**

Advait is relentless. His obsession is undeniable. But Samaira's will is unbreakable. **Neither of them is willing to surrender.**

Power and love collide. Can Samaira escape Advait's dark world, or will she be consumed by it forever?

 Click to be part of this emotional rollercoaster, where control is everything and love means nothing

title: The Crowned Prince
description:
🔅This story is not a historical fiction.🔅







🔅🔆🔅

He was standing in his balcony, feeling the cold night and sipping over his black coffee. 

Suddenly , he saw a silhouette in the garden moving near the boundaries. He placed his coffee aside and moved a little forward squinting his eyes to see the person but darkness created by trees at that place was not helping.

He quickly went towards the garden instead of shouting for guards. When he was entering the garden , he saw that it was none other than her.

She was climbing the walls and soon she jumped over the wall. He ran towards his car and ignited the engine.He followed her outside the palace keeping his speed slow. 

"Why is she sneaking like a thief?" 

"Is she the traitor whom he was searching for days, who was involved in data breeching?" 

All these questions flooded his mind seeing her walking speedily while tucking her hands in the side pockets of her hoodie.

He was following her quietly and she was continuously walking on the black asphalt road in the midnight oblivious of his presence.

His heart was beating fast with the anticipation, it was not like he had agreed fully what Rohan had said yesterday but now he was preparing himself to see the worst thing his mind ever could imagine about her. 

She was not like that. 
She can't betray him. 
But if she is the culprit then he will not hesitate before doing what he usually does to a traitor.
She would get the punishment and the punishment is DEATH. 

🔅🔆🔅



   Welcome to the life of ROYALS. 
 Royals whose lifes are unpredictable. 
    Royals who rule on the people.  

🔅🔆🔅


He says,  " Don't you ever dare to hurt me,  because if it will be my turn, you will have to google how to stop crying."

🔅🔆🔅

She says,  " I refused to let it break me, I faced the tragedy,  I felt the pain  and it only made me stronger"

🔅🔆

title: For now and forever
description:
"How dare you touch him?" she shouts at the girl standing in front of Abhimanyu. 

The girl frowns at her sudden appearance and outburst.

"Who are you, girl? And why are poking your nose in my business? " 
hearing the annoyed voice of that girl, Aaravi look at her in disbelief before glaring at Abhimanyu who give her 'what' look.

"He IS my very own business. And for your kind information, he is my husband and also father of my cute little babies," she declare making everyone present there completely shocked.

______

"I don't want to marry right now, I am not sure. I am not ready," Aaravi said and tightly closed her eyes, feeling them burning. She felt as if her soul left her body just by uttering this cruel lie. 

She is helpless or maybe coward or stupid.

Abhimanyu snapped his head toward her in shock and he felt his blood freeze in his veins as he tried to grasp what she really meant. 

_________

"Enough of your hide and seek, Jaan. It's my turn to play the game," he whispered in his dark tone and evil tone.

_______

"No one can stop me from making you mine now. I know you are hiding something and I swear on our love Aaravi, I will find out very soon," 

Hearing his promise, her heart started beating fast in anxiety and fear. 

No!! I won't let you, Manyu.

________

"Thinking of you keeps me awake.
 Dreaming of you keeps me asleep. 
Being with you keeps me alive."
                                          -Abhimanyu

"Loved you yesterday, love you still, always have, always will."
                                           -Aaravi



Join the beautiful journey of Abhimanyu Agnihotri and Aaravi Roy's eternal love story.

title: His Little Star
description:
"He is a scary man, Ivy! You should keep your distance from him." 

"His sons are equally as cruel as him.." 

"This whole family is actually heartless."

Growing up, Ivy's ears are filled with warnings to stay away from this particular Santiago family. The leader of the family, Mr. Lucifer Santiago is a rumoured cruel mafia leader who doesn't think once before staining his hands with someone's blood. Then comes his three sons- Valentino, Denver and Alessio. Arrogant, cruel and manipulative. 

16 year old, an normal looking orphan Ivy is told to keep her distance from these dangerous people and she tries to follow everyone's advice but none of her plans seems to be working as the family suddenly starts to show a different interest in her. Now it has become extremely hard to keep distance from them. Especially when Mr. Lucifer Santiago himself call her 'his little star'.

title: The Moon to my night
description:
Two imperfectly perfect fell in love.
Something happened and they drifted apart. What will happen when they cross each other's path again?
Will Aradhaya forgive Rudransh for breaking her heart?
Read to know!
..................

"It will. You won't be able to help yourself from falling for me again, and you'll keep falling for me every day." He declared, pulling me back up and twirling me again. "This time, you'll never fall out of love with me."

This man and his confidence. Sometimes I wished to laugh at his words, but they seemed to seep under my skin and infuriate me.

As we moved into a series of side steps, our eyes locked, and the rest of the world faded away. "You wish," I said, my breath coming quicker. "And it will never be fulfilled."

His hand slid from my waist to my hand, lifting our arms for an elegant turn. "I don't wish; I pray. Every day, every night, every second of the time I breathe, I pray, and prayers are always answered."

The music intensified, and we matched its energy with a dramatic lift, my body stretching out in perfect alignment as he held me high. "I'll pray otherwise then," I whispered, and I felt his grip tighten in response.

As the song reached its climax, we moved into the final sequence. Our steps quickened, and we executed a series of synchronized turns and dips, the chemistry between us undeniable. "To never fall for you again," I spoke, breathless but exhilarated.

He smiled, his eyes never leaving mine as he spun me into a final, breathtaking dip. "Your Mahadev is in my favor this time."

....


Explore this enthralling tale about two passionate individuals and their fiery romance, coupled with heartwarming family moments.

title: Hot Coffee (The Hollens Book 1)
description:
When plain simple nerdy Emma Cole goes to Hollen Tower for an interview she quickly realizes she is out of her league. The women of Hollen Tower are gorgeous, and their shoes cost more than her entire wardrobe. But an accident, and a talent for coffee, put Emma in the position to meet the man of her dreams. There's just one problem, he's engaged. And when Emma falls for CEO Ethan Hollen she finds herself in the middle of a dangerous plot she never would have imagined.

Ethan Hollen wasn't born with a silver spoon in his mouth but he climbed the ladder to riches very quickly. At just twenty four, he is one of the youngest and most powerful CEOs. With a huge mansion, several cars, successful business, and beautiful fiancée, he has it all. But when internal enemies threaten everything he's built, he must quickly act to save his company and the woman he loves.

title: Silver's Seduction
description:
After her torrid affair with Eden--her PA--is unveiled to the world, Silver Bell is faced with consequences and decisions that could jeopardize her entire career; and her growing feelings for Eden.

Season 2 of A Billionaire Love Story 

***

Now that she's been outed as a boss who sleeps with her PAs, Silver has no choice but to distance herself from the woman who has her hands wrapped around her heart--and her panties. Despite Eden being shipped off to a new gig--thanks to her overbearing temp agency--Silver can't quit thinking about her and all the things she'd still like to do with her. No matter how many times her lawyers and PR team tell her to cool it, she abides nothing but her cravings and puts herself and Eden in constant jeopardy of being caught again. And when she finds out the source of all her problems is none other than the PA from her past, Silver develops a need to protect Eden from the truth; a truth so detrimental, she's not sure Eden will continue to see her if she finds out. Can Silver keep Eden at arm's length *and* fix her mistakes to keep her career? Or is she destined to always have to choose between the two?

***

Weekly updates on Thursdays. Wait & read for free, or unlock with coins-the choice is yours!

title: Homeless
description:
Daphne lives with her brother Mark on the streets. A chance encounter with Nathaniel tangles their lives together. 
As Daphne tries to make a life for herself and her brother, feelings brew between her and Nathaniel. But when old secrets about Daphne's life come to light, will Daphne trust Nathaniel to help her fight the monsters from her past? Or will she chose to run away once again?

This is a homeless girl's journey to find herself and love, escaping the past and the streets.

Trigger Warning: This book contains elements of physical and sexual abuse, panic attacks, and references to drug use and rape.

description:

But what about their Life? They belong to

Two different ways

Because of a DEAL, a fateful deal entangled avni with bhavik vaidya, the most dangerous man in the shadowy underworld, do avni have what it takes to be a Mafia's Bride??

description:
'𝘔𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘣𝘦 𝘤𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘯 𝘤𝘶𝘵, 𝘊𝘩𝘳𝘪𝘴𝘵𝘪𝘢𝘯 𝘮𝘢𝘯, 𝘯𝘰 𝘴𝘩𝘢𝘥𝘺 𝘱𝘢𝘴𝘵, 𝘨𝘰𝘰𝘥 𝘧𝘢𝘮𝘪𝘭𝘺, 𝘤𝘰𝘭𝘭𝘦𝘨𝘦 𝘥𝘦𝘨𝘳𝘦𝘦(𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘧𝘦𝘳𝘢𝘣𝘭𝘺 𝘮𝘢𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘳'𝘴 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘢𝘣𝘰𝘷𝘦) 𝘯𝘰 𝘤𝘩𝘪𝘭𝘥𝘳𝘦𝘯, 𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘳𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘪𝘳, 𝘴𝘦𝘳𝘪𝘰𝘶𝘴, 𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘧𝘦𝘳𝘢𝘣𝘭𝘺 𝘢 𝘣𝘶𝘴𝘪𝘯𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘮𝘢𝘯, 9-5 𝘫𝘰𝘣, 𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘤𝘵𝘢𝘣𝘭𝘦 𝘴𝘤𝘩𝘦𝘥𝘶𝘭𝘦, 𝘥𝘳𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘦𝘴 𝘯𝘪𝘤𝘦𝘭𝘺, 𝘴𝘮𝘦𝘭𝘭𝘴 𝘨𝘰𝘰𝘥, 𝘵𝘦𝘭𝘭𝘴 𝘮𝘦 𝘐'𝘮 𝘣𝘦𝘢𝘶𝘵𝘪𝘧𝘶𝘭.'

She drew a line across everything he wasn't.

"Three out of fourteen." 

What was she thinking?

Rather, how could she have been so blind to what really mattered?

-

This is the story of a baseball player and a journalist falling in love.

-

Book four of the Song of Solomon Collection, a Christian romance collection with love, pure intimacy, and Christ. A clean read for all to enjoy, no language, no sex, only love.

This story is inspired by Song of Solomon 2:10-13, "My beloved speaks and says to me, Rise up, my love, my fair one, and come away. For, behold, the winter is past; the rain is over and gone. The flowers appear on the earth; the time of the singing [of birds] has come, and the voice of the turtledove is heard in our land. The fig tree puts forth and ripens her green figs, and the vines are in blossom and give forth their fragrance. Arise, my love, my fair one, and come away."

title: WILD
description:
In the arena, ten females must outrun or outlast their male counterparts to keep from being forcibly bred. At least that's how Lorena saw it.

She was taken from her home in front of her entire family to be a runner for ten males that were around her own packs' territory. Female werewolves seemed to be holding out longer on mating and/or refusing to take a mate, so it's gotten to the point where the council had to force it upon them. Some agreed with the new policy just to be cruel, but others agreed that since her pack had plenty of females to go around, they would volunteer a handful of them to mate with the alphas and any other male wolves as needed.

Lorena may not have been the prettiest wolf in her opinion, but she was cunning, strong, and fast, and she thought for sure she would be able to last and run until the alpha that had his eye on her eventually gave up.

Boy was she wrong.

title: Iqraar
description:
Raised in a small, traditional town, Khushi Kumari Gupta's world is turned upside down when she crosses paths with the enigmatic and ruthless business tycoon, Arnav Singh Raizada. A simple twist of fate pulls them into a tangled web of rumors, forcing them into a relationship neither saw coming.

Arnav, a man who thrives on control, is unprepared for the storm that is Khushi - a woman of faith, heart, and determination. As their worlds collide, Khushi is thrust into a life under the unforgiving glare of the public eye, bringing about a fierce protectiveness in Arnav that surprises even him.

In a story that blends passion, conflict, and the power of love, Iqraar explores the sparks that fly when two very different worlds collide.


This is a fanfiction based on Iss Pyaar Ko Kya Naam Doon? set in an alternate universe. Story, concept and everything else except the characters' names belong to me. That said, I do like to include elements and references from the show here and there and in those cases complete credit to the makers.

Please do not copy. It would really hurt to see this work elsewhere without my knowledge.

authorBio:
CHEATING, any type of cheating or betrayal will never be glorified, justified, normalized or excused in my story. Men or Women, I believe we all deserve love, respect and loyalty.

I love having strong Females, who know to say no, who know their boundaries, who can be both nice and wise, and who don't have to forgive an asshole to be a better person, neither do I believe in giving such people another chance to hurt us again.

I also believe in Real Man, and they do exist, just far too lost to be appreciated because of shitty ones spoiling the name of their species.

I believe in KARMA. I believe our wrong choices, and especially hurting someone always come back to us. And I am not a fan of always making Manw***e characters, I do it when I feel fit, but as I said no wrong would ever be supported by me by any means.

I am a person who believes in Being kind not a Fool.
Being strong, not cruel.
Being understanding not a doormat that allows anyone to walk over them.
Last but not least, Know who to Love and Forgive, because some mistakes are unforgivable.

title: If only it was an Illusion!
description:
"you're no one to me", his words echoed in my ears but what was it all when he kissed me; merely an illusion? It felt so real and lively.

 "...and just so you know, you're not allowed to leave this job until or before 6 months", he flung the contract papers in the air. 

I had signed the papers, the terms and conditions clearly meant that I was supposed to work for his company and had no right to leave it until his consent. 

"Leave my cabin for now", he ordered as he turned behind. 

**********

Amanda Waters is your typical College student who happens to face a lot of financial difficulties and as a result, is made to earn a living. She's blunt, She's sensitive but she is also accompanied by two of her best friends in this story: Gina Sullivan and Francis Rutherfold.

The enterprise which she works in is different, very different. In fact, the 'CEO' is not just another Happy go lucky male lead of the company. Aaron Reynolds- Rude, Arrogant, Harsh, and Stubborn. He's what they call an eccedentesiast. They say that a person who defines negative adjectives has a lot more inside them, the darkness in that person may overrule all the Positiveness. Well, with Aaron, it's hard to say.

But...What if Amanda already had a face-off with 'The CEO' before working in his firm? What if she had already drawn a thick line of hate? What if egos of the same level collide?  What then?

True Love? More like an illusion! An illusion that poses a life threat. An illusion with the ability to make you believe in non-existent things such as; fairies, demons, fate, and even destiny! Ironic is it not? What we as humans happen to rely on.

In other news, I'd like to share some of my favoritest published romance authors. so here goes:

Susan Mallery- her heroines are not the stereotype ones. she covers women over different lifestyles and characters. what they all have in common are big hearts and amazing personality. She's like my idol because we kinda write the same genre so I hope to reach her level soon. Or even touch that realm.

Nalini Singh- I love the Psy-Changeling series. always looking out for new books. I want to eventually write supernatural romance so I aim to write as well as her.

Gena Showalter- the Lords of the Underworld series. Hot men with demons inside them. who wouldn't love it?

Kresley cole- Supernatural world. Creatures finding their mates in the most unlikely situations. Fighting. The components are all there for a phenomenal series.

Hannah Howell- her historicals are nicely written. whenever I have a book of hers, I never want to put them down.

Sandra Hill- Vikings. that should explain everything.

Catherine Anderson- hers are the very well written books. They explore different issues. I love that they are soo well-rounded

title: SIYAASAT
description:
SIYAASAT the game of power, greed, envy, selfishness, conspiracy.

The one who will win the game is called.

The Ace of Spades.

_______________________________

" Bhai" I entered my brother's office to call him outside. The office is dark and my brother is standing in the middle and 3 - 4 people are around him. 

" Bhai" I called him and everyone look at me startled. My brother looks at me like he wants to say something to me but can't say it.

I take a step forward and the person who is standing in front of my brother turned and my breathing stopped. His face was covered with a white handkerchief but his eyes are visible.

They are dark so dark yet alluring. I keep looking at him and he takes a step forward. 

My back collided with the wall and he come close to me. He come dangerously close to me and I close my eyes suddenly I felt him pull away and I open my eyes I see them all going but one thing caught my attention it's a shiny object which he held in his hand.

A gun.

_______________________

He raise his hand and filled my hairline with sindoor.

" From now on you're husband and wife" the Priest announced.

________________________

I come into my room and locked the door. I turned and my eyes widened as I see him sitting on my bed. He looks at me and starts walking towards me taking predatory steps.

He tried to intimidate me but I also look at him with the same intensity. He grabbed my hands and pinned them on the wall beside me and leaning closer I turned my face away.

" Mohobbat karte hai tumse, toh kya pagal kar dalogi. Marte hai tum par, toh kya maar hi dalogi" he whispered in my ear.

" Keemat," he said and I look at him.

" Everything has a price you say yours. Keep your hand on it and it will be yours" he look at me with intensity.

" Jo kahogi vo tumhara or tum hamari" I smirked because what I want he can't give me.

" Palace"

________________________________

ʜᴀᴢᴀʀᴏɴ ᴋʜᴡᴀʜɪꜱʜᴇ ᴀɪꜱɪ ᴋᴇ ʜᴀʀ ᴋʜᴡᴀʜɪꜱʜ ᴘᴇ ᴅᴀᴍ ɴɪᴋʟᴇ,
ʙᴀʜᴜᴛ ɴɪᴋʟᴇ ᴍᴇʀᴇ ᴀʀᴍᴀɴ ʟᴇᴋɪɴ ꜰɪʀ ʙʜɪ ᴋᴀᴍ ɴɪᴋʟᴇ.

𝗬𝗼𝘂 𝗺𝗮𝘆 𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘁 𝗺𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗱𝘀,
𝗬𝗼𝘂 𝗺𝗮𝘆 𝗰𝘂𝘁 𝗺𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗲𝘆𝗲𝘀,
𝗬𝗼𝘂 𝗺𝗮𝘆 𝗸𝗶𝗹𝗹 𝗺𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗵𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗳𝘂𝗹𝗻𝗲𝘀𝘀,
𝗕𝘂𝘁 𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗹, 𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲 𝗮𝗶𝗿, 𝗜'𝗹𝗹 𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗲.

𝓜𝓨 𝓦𝓞𝓡𝓚𝓢

title: I Became The Protagonist's Child
description:
When reading many novels and transmigrating one either becomes a random cannon fodder, a side villain, the main, the protagonist mom, Dad, cousin to heck even the protagonist themselves!

but why did I became their child!!!

I became the thing that drove the plot and brought them together!! 

no!!!!

I don't want this!!!



Cover made by @aurora_2604
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hi  Just here to write and enjoy stories  Don't have a stable publishing time please just ask if you want me to update on a story you'd like to be updated Thank you all
